22166:         const requirementsByRandomTractive = {};
22167:         for (const [trailerType, metadata] of Object.entries(vehicleTypes)) {
22168:             const tractives = Array.isArray(metadata?.tractiveVehicles)
22169:                 ? metadata.tractiveVehicles.map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite)
22170:                 : [];
22171:             if (!tractives.length) continue;
22172:             requirementsByRandomTractive[trailerType] = {};
22173:             for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
22174:                 let intersection = null;
22175:                 for (const tractiveType of tractives) {
22176:                     const values = new Set(requirementsForVehicle[String(tractiveType)]?.[group] ?? []);
22177:                     intersection = intersection === null
22178:                         ? values
22179:                         : new Set(Array.from(intersection).filter(value => values.has(value)));
22180:                 }
22181:                 requirementsByRandomTractive[trailerType][group] = Array.from(intersection ?? []);
22182:             }
22183:         }
22184: 
22185:         const randomTractiveCounts = {};
22186:         for (const vehicle of selectedVehicles) {
22187:             const vehicleType = Number(vehicle?.vehicleType);
22188:             if (!Number.isFinite(vehicleType) || vehicleType < 0) continue;
22189:             const staff = operationalRequirementCloneRange(vehicle?.staff);
22190:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'vehicles', 1);
22191:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'other', 1);
22192:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'staff', 1, staff);
22193:             for (const equipment of Array.isArray(vehicle?.equipment) ? vehicle.equipment : []) {
22194:                 for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
22195:                     increaseSelected(String(equipment), group, 1, null, true);
22196:                 }
22197:             }
22198: 
22199:             const tractiveId = Number(vehicle?.tractiveVehicleId);
22200:             const tractiveType = Number(vehicle?.tractiveVehicleType);
22201:             const explicitTractive = vehicle?.tractiveRandom === false || vehicle?.tractiveRandom === 0 || vehicle?.tractiveRandom === '0';
22202:             if (explicitTractive && Number.isFinite(tractiveType) && !selectedIds.has(tractiveId)) {
22203:                 const tractiveStaff = operationalRequirementCloneRange(vehicle?.tractiveStaff);
22204:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'vehicles', 1);
22205:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'other', 1);
22206:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'staff', 1, tractiveStaff);
22207:             } else if (vehicleTypes[String(vehicleType)]?.tractiveVehicles) {
22208:                 randomTractiveCounts[String(vehicleType)] = (randomTractiveCounts[String(vehicleType)] ?? 0) + 1;
22209:             }
22210:         }
22211: 
22212:         for (const [trailerType, amount] of Object.entries(randomTractiveCounts)) {
22213:             for (const group of ['vehicles', 'other']) {
22214:                 for (const requirementIndex of requirementsByRandomTractive[trailerType]?.[group] ?? []) {
22215:                     selected[group][requirementIndex] += Number(amount) || 0;
22216:                 }
22217:             }
22218:         }
22219: 
22220:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
22221:             requirements[group].forEach((requirement, index) => {
22222:                 if (requirement.bar) {
22223:                     const progress = input.progress?.[requirement.bar];
22224:                     requirement.selected = Math.max(0, Number(progress?.selected) || 0);
22225:                 } else {
22226:                     requirement.selected = group === 'staff'
22227:                         ? operationalRequirementCloneRange(selected.staff[index])
22228:                         : Math.max(0, Number(selected[group][index]) || 0);
22229:                 }
22230:             });
22231:         }
22232: 
22233:         return {
22234:             requirements,
22235:             requirementTexts,
22236:             requirementsForVehicle,
22237:             requirementsForEquipment
22238:         };
22239:     }
22240: 
22241:     function operationalRequirementRows(model, options = {}) {
22242:         const calcMaxStaff = options.calcMaxStaff === true;
22243:         const rows = [];
22244:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
22245:             for (const requirement of model?.requirements?.[group] ?? []) {
22246:                 const selectedValue = typeof requirement.selected === 'number'
22247:                     ? requirement.selected
22248:                     : calcMaxStaff
22249:                       ? requirement.selected.max
22250:                       : requirement.selected.min;
22251:                 const remainingOnMission = requirement.missing - requirement.driving;
22252:                 rows.push({
22253:                     ...requirement,
22254:                     group,
22255:                     remainingOnMission,
22256:                     selectedValue,
22257:                     covered: remainingOnMission <= selectedValue
22258:                 });
22259:             }
22260:         }
22261:         return rows;
22262:     }
22263: 
22264:     function operationalRequirementFingerprint(model, options = {}) {
22265:         return JSON.stringify({
22266:             rows: operationalRequirementRows(model, options),
22267:             remaining: OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS.map(group => model?.requirementTexts?.[group]?.remaining ?? null)
22268:         });
22269:     }
22270:     // Issue #378 end enhanced requirements pure engine.
22271: 
22272:     // Issue #378 enhanced requirements runtime renderer.
22273:     const OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENTS_STYLE_ID = 'mcms-operational-requirements-style';
22274:     const OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENTS_PANEL_CLASS = 'mcms-operational-suite-panel';
22275:     let operationalRequirementsCatalogCache = null;
22276: 
22277:     function operationalRequirementsActive() {
22278:         return operationalSuiteEnabled() && state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false;
22279:     }
22280: 
22281:     function operationalRequirementsEquivalentLssmActive(doc) {
22282:         return Boolean(doc?.querySelector?.('.alert-missing-vehicles[data-raw-html], [data-module="extendedCallWindow"] .alert-missing-vehicles'));
22283:     }
22284: 
22285:     function operationalRequirementsRuntimeCatalog() {
22286:         if (operationalRequirementsCatalogCache) return operationalRequirementsCatalogCache;
22287:         const catalog = { vehicles: [], staff: [], other: [] };
22288:         for (const definition of MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS) {
22289:             const sourceGroup = String(definition?.group || 'vehicles').toLowerCase();
22290:             const group = sourceGroup === 'personnel' || sourceGroup === 'staff'
22291:                 ? 'staff'
22292:                 : sourceGroup === 'other'
22293:                   ? 'other'
22294:                   : 'vehicles';
22295:             const texts = Array.from(new Set([definition?.label, ...(definition?.aliases || [])]))
22296:                 .map(value => String(value || '').trim())
22297:                 .filter(Boolean);
22298:             if (!texts.length) continue;
22299:             catalog[group].push({
22300:                 key: String(definition?.key || `${group}:${catalog[group].length}`),
22301:                 texts,
22302:                 vehicles: Array.from(new Set((definition?.types || []).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite))),
22303:                 equipment: Array.from(new Set((definition?.equipment || []).map(value => String(value || '').trim()).filter(Boolean))),
22304:                 conditionalVehicles: definition?.conditionalVehicles && typeof definition.conditionalVehicles === 'object'
22305:                     ? { ...definition.conditionalVehicles }
22306:                     : {},
22307:                 factors: definition?.factors && typeof definition.factors === 'object' ? { ...definition.factors } : {}
22308:             });
22309:         }
22310:         operationalRequirementsCatalogCache = Object.freeze({
22311:             vehicles: Object.freeze(catalog.vehicles),
22312:             staff: Object.freeze(catalog.staff),
22313:             other: Object.freeze(catalog.other)
22314:         });
22315:         return operationalRequirementsCatalogCache;
22316:     }
22317: 
22318:     function operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, names) {
22319:         for (const name of names) {
22320:             const value = node?.getAttribute?.(name);
22321:             if (value !== null && value !== undefined && String(value).trim() !== '') return String(value).trim();
22322:         }
22323:         return '';
22324:     }
22325: 
22326:     function operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(value, fallback = 0) {
22327:         const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/gu, ''), 10);
22328:         return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : fallback;
22329:     }
22330: 
22331:     function operationalRequirementsVehicleType(node) {
22332:         const row = node?.closest?.('tr') || node;
22333:         return operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, [
22334:             'vehicle_type_id', 'data-vehicle-type-id', 'data-vehicle-type', 'vehicle-type-id'
22335:         ]) || operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, [
22336:             'vehicle_type_id', 'data-vehicle-type-id', 'data-vehicle-type', 'vehicle-type-id'
22337:         ]), -1);
22338:     }
22339: 
22340:     function operationalRequirementsVehicleId(node) {
22341:         const row = node?.closest?.('tr') || node;
22342:         return operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, [
22343:             'value', 'vehicle_id', 'data-vehicle-id'
22344:         ]) || operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, ['vehicle_id', 'data-vehicle-id']), -1);
22345:     }
22346: 
22347:     function operationalRequirementsEquipment(node) {
22348:         const row = node?.closest?.('tr') || node;
22349:         const raw = operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, ['data-equipment-types', 'data-equipment-type', 'equipment_types'])
22350:             || operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, ['data-equipment-types', 'data-equipment-type', 'equipment_types']);
22351:         if (!raw) return [];
22352:         try {
22353:             const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
22354:             if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return parsed.map(value => String(value)).filter(Boolean);
22355:         } catch (error) {}
22356:         return raw.split(/[|,;\s]+/gu).map(value => value.trim()).filter(Boolean);
22357:     }
22358: 
22359:     function operationalRequirementsStaffRange(typeId, node = null) {
22360:         const row = node?.closest?.('tr') || node;
22361:         const explicitMin = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, [
22362:             'data-staff-min', 'data-personnel-min', 'data-crew-min'
22363:         ]), -1);
22364:         const explicitMax = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, [
22365:             'data-staff-max', 'data-personnel-max', 'data-crew-max', 'data-max-personnel-override'
22366:         ]), -1);
22367:         if (explicitMin >= 0 || explicitMax >= 0) {
22368:             const min = Math.max(0, explicitMin >= 0 ? explicitMin : explicitMax);
22369:             return { min, max: Math.max(min, explicitMax >= 0 ? explicitMax : min) };
22370:         }
22371:         const fallback = MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_DEFAULT_STAFF_BY_TYPE?.[String(typeId)]
22372:             || MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_DEFAULT_STAFF_BY_TYPE?.[typeId];
22373:         if (!Array.isArray(fallback) || fallback.length < 2) return { min: 0, max: 0 };
22374:         return { min: Math.max(0, Number(fallback[0]) || 0), max: Math.max(0, Number(fallback[1]) || 0) };
22375:     }
22376: 
22377:     function operationalRequirementsResolveVehicleType(doc, vehicleId) {
22378:         if (!doc?.querySelector || !Number.isFinite(Number(vehicleId)) || Number(vehicleId) < 0) return -1;
22379:         const selector = `.vehicle_checkbox[value="${Number(vehicleId)}"], [data-vehicle-id="${Number(vehicleId)}"], [vehicle_id="${Number(vehicleId)}"]`;
22380:         return operationalRequirementsVehicleType(doc.querySelector(selector));
22381:     }
22382: 
22383:     function operationalRequirementsSelectedSnapshot(doc) {
22384:         const selector = '#vehicle_show_table_body_all .vehicle_checkbox:checked, #occupied .vehicle_checkbox:checked';
22385:         return Array.from(doc?.querySelectorAll?.(selector) || []).map(node => {
22386:             const vehicleType = operationalRequirementsVehicleType(node);
22387:             const tractiveVehicleId = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(
22388:                 operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, ['tractive_vehicle_id', 'data-tractive-vehicle-id'])
22389:                 || operationalRequirementsAttribute(node.closest?.('tr'), ['tractive_vehicle_id', 'data-tractive-vehicle-id']),
22390:                 -1
22391:             );
22392:             const tractiveRaw = operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, ['tractive_random', 'data-tractive-random'])
22393:                 || operationalRequirementsAttribute(node.closest?.('tr'), ['tractive_random', 'data-tractive-random']);
22394:             return {
22395:                 id: operationalRequirementsVehicleId(node),
22396:                 vehicleType,
22397:                 equipment: operationalRequirementsEquipment(node),
22398:                 staff: operationalRequirementsStaffRange(vehicleType, node),
22399:                 tractiveVehicleId,
22400:                 tractiveVehicleType: operationalRequirementsResolveVehicleType(doc, tractiveVehicleId),
22401:                 tractiveStaff: operationalRequirementsStaffRange(operationalRequirementsResolveVehicleType(doc, tractiveVehicleId), null),
22402:                 tractiveRandom: tractiveRaw === '' ? null : !['0', 'false', 'no'].includes(tractiveRaw.toLowerCase())
22403:             };
22404:         }).filter(vehicle => Number.isFinite(vehicle.vehicleType) && vehicle.vehicleType >= 0);
22405:     }
22406: 
22407:     function operationalRequirementsDrivingStaff(row, typeId) {
22408:         const explicit = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, [
22409:             'data-staff', 'data-personnel', 'data-personnel-count', 'personnel_count'
22410:         ]), -1);
22411:         if (explicit >= 0) return explicit;
22412:         for (const cell of Array.from(row?.querySelectorAll?.('[data-column="personnel"], [data-column="staff"], .vehicle_staff, .staff') || [])) {
22413:             const value = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(cell?.getAttribute?.('sortvalue') ?? cell?.textContent, -1);
22414:             if (value >= 0) return value;
22415:         }
22416:         const fallback = operationalRequirementsStaffRange(typeId, row);
22417:         return fallback.min;
22418:     }
22419: 
22420:     function operationalRequirementsDrivingSnapshot(doc) {
22421:         return Array.from(doc?.querySelectorAll?.('#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr') || []).map(row => {
--- lines 22186-22446 ---
22186:         for (const vehicle of selectedVehicles) {
22187:             const vehicleType = Number(vehicle?.vehicleType);
22188:             if (!Number.isFinite(vehicleType) || vehicleType < 0) continue;
22189:             const staff = operationalRequirementCloneRange(vehicle?.staff);
22190:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'vehicles', 1);
22191:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'other', 1);
22192:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'staff', 1, staff);
22193:             for (const equipment of Array.isArray(vehicle?.equipment) ? vehicle.equipment : []) {
22194:                 for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
22195:                     increaseSelected(String(equipment), group, 1, null, true);
22196:                 }
22197:             }
22198: 
22199:             const tractiveId = Number(vehicle?.tractiveVehicleId);
22200:             const tractiveType = Number(vehicle?.tractiveVehicleType);
22201:             const explicitTractive = vehicle?.tractiveRandom === false || vehicle?.tractiveRandom === 0 || vehicle?.tractiveRandom === '0';
22202:             if (explicitTractive && Number.isFinite(tractiveType) && !selectedIds.has(tractiveId)) {
22203:                 const tractiveStaff = operationalRequirementCloneRange(vehicle?.tractiveStaff);
22204:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'vehicles', 1);
22205:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'other', 1);
22206:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'staff', 1, tractiveStaff);
22207:             } else if (vehicleTypes[String(vehicleType)]?.tractiveVehicles) {
22208:                 randomTractiveCounts[String(vehicleType)] = (randomTractiveCounts[String(vehicleType)] ?? 0) + 1;
22209:             }
22210:         }
22211: 
22212:         for (const [trailerType, amount] of Object.entries(randomTractiveCounts)) {
22213:             for (const group of ['vehicles', 'other']) {
22214:                 for (const requirementIndex of requirementsByRandomTractive[trailerType]?.[group] ?? []) {
22215:                     selected[group][requirementIndex] += Number(amount) || 0;
22216:                 }
22217:             }
22218:         }
22219: 
22220:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
22221:             requirements[group].forEach((requirement, index) => {
22222:                 if (requirement.bar) {
22223:                     const progress = input.progress?.[requirement.bar];
22224:                     requirement.selected = Math.max(0, Number(progress?.selected) || 0);
22225:                 } else {
22226:                     requirement.selected = group === 'staff'
22227:                         ? operationalRequirementCloneRange(selected.staff[index])
22228:                         : Math.max(0, Number(selected[group][index]) || 0);
22229:                 }
22230:             });
22231:         }
22232: 
22233:         return {
22234:             requirements,
22235:             requirementTexts,
22236:             requirementsForVehicle,
22237:             requirementsForEquipment
22238:         };
22239:     }
22240: 
22241:     function operationalRequirementRows(model, options = {}) {
22242:         const calcMaxStaff = options.calcMaxStaff === true;
22243:         const rows = [];
22244:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
22245:             for (const requirement of model?.requirements?.[group] ?? []) {
22246:                 const selectedValue = typeof requirement.selected === 'number'
22247:                     ? requirement.selected
22248:                     : calcMaxStaff
22249:                       ? requirement.selected.max
22250:                       : requirement.selected.min;
22251:                 const remainingOnMission = requirement.missing - requirement.driving;
22252:                 rows.push({
22253:                     ...requirement,
22254:                     group,
22255:                     remainingOnMission,
22256:                     selectedValue,
22257:                     covered: remainingOnMission <= selectedValue
22258:                 });
22259:             }
22260:         }
22261:         return rows;
22262:     }
22263: 
22264:     function operationalRequirementFingerprint(model, options = {}) {
22265:         return JSON.stringify({
22266:             rows: operationalRequirementRows(model, options),
22267:             remaining: OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS.map(group => model?.requirementTexts?.[group]?.remaining ?? null)
22268:         });
22269:     }

22291:                 ? 'staff'

22293:                   ? 'other'

22296:                 .map(value => String(value || '').trim())
22297:                 .filter(Boolean);

22299:             catalog[group].push({
22300:                 key: String(definition?.key || `${group}:${catalog[group].length}`),

22359:     function operationalRequirementsStaffRange(typeId, node = null) {
22360:         const row = node?.closest?.('tr') || node;
22361:         const explicitMin = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, [
22362:             'data-staff-min', 'data-personnel-min', 'data-crew-min'
22363:         ]), -1);
22364:         const explicitMax = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, [
22365:             'data-staff-max', 'data-personnel-max', 'data-crew-max', 'data-max-personnel-override'
22366:         ]), -1);
22367:         if (explicitMin >= 0 || explicitMax >= 0) {
22368:             const min = Math.max(0, explicitMin >= 0 ? explicitMin : explicitMax);
22369:             return { min, max: Math.max(min, explicitMax >= 0 ? explicitMax : min) };
22370:         }
22371:         const fallback = MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_DEFAULT_STAFF_BY_TYPE?.[String(typeId)]
22372:             || MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_DEFAULT_STAFF_BY_TYPE?.[typeId];
22373:         if (!Array.isArray(fallback) || fallback.length < 2) return { min: 0, max: 0 };
22374:         return { min: Math.max(0, Number(fallback[0]) || 0), max: Math.max(0, Number(fallback[1]) || 0) };
22375:     }

22378:         if (!doc?.querySelector || !Number.isFinite(Number(vehicleId)) || Number(vehicleId) < 0) return -1;
22379:         const selector = `.vehicle_checkbox[value="${Number(vehicleId)}"], [data-vehicle-id="${Number(vehicleId)}"], [vehicle_id="${Number(vehicleId)}"]`;
22380:         return operationalRequirementsVehicleType(doc.querySelector(selector));
22381:     }

22383:     function operationalRequirementsSelectedSnapshot(doc) {
22384:         const selector = '#vehicle_show_table_body_all .vehicle_checkbox:checked, #occupied .vehicle_checkbox:checked';
22385:         return Array.from(doc?.querySelectorAll?.(selector) || []).map(node => {
22386:             const vehicleType = operationalRequirementsVehicleType(node);
22387:             const tractiveVehicleId = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(
22388:                 operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, ['tractive_vehicle_id', 'data-tractive-vehicle-id'])
22389:                 || operationalRequirementsAttribute(node.closest?.('tr'), ['tractive_vehicle_id', 'data-tractive-vehicle-id']),
22390:                 -1
22391:             );
22392:             const tractiveRaw = operationalRequirementsAttribute(node, ['tractive_random', 'data-tractive-random'])
22393:                 || operationalRequirementsAttribute(node.closest?.('tr'), ['tractive_random', 'data-tractive-random']);

22401:                 tractiveStaff: operationalRequirementsStaffRange(operationalRequirementsResolveVehicleType(doc, tractiveVehicleId), null),
22402:                 tractiveRandom: tractiveRaw === '' ? null : !['0', 'false', 'no'].includes(tractiveRaw.toLowerCase())
22403:             };
22404:         }).filter(vehicle => Number.isFinite(vehicle.vehicleType) && vehicle.vehicleType >= 0);
22405:     }

22407:     function operationalRequirementsDrivingStaff(row, typeId) {
22408:         const explicit = operationalRequirementsNumberFrom(operationalRequirementsAttribute(row, [
22409:             'data-staff', 'data-personnel', 'data-personnel-count', 'personnel_count'
22410:         ]), -1);
22411:         if (explicit >= 0) return explicit;
22412:         for (const cell of Array.from(row?.querySelectorAll?.('[data-column="personnel"], [data-column="staff"], .vehicle_staff, .staff') || [])) {

22418:     }
22419: 
22420:     function operationalRequirementsDrivingSnapshot(doc) {
22421:         return Array.from(doc?.querySelectorAll?.('#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr') || []).map(row => {
22422:             const vehicleType = operationalRequirementsVehicleType(row);
22423:             return {
22424:                 id: operationalRequirementsVehicleId(row),
22425:                 vehicleType,
22426:                 equipment: operationalRequirementsEquipment(row),
22427:                 staff: operationalRequirementsDrivingStaff(row, vehicleType)
22428:             };
22429:         }).filter(vehicle => Number.isFinite(vehicle.vehicleType) && vehicle.vehicleType >= 0);
22430:     }
22431: 
22432:     function operationalRequirementsTexts(root) {
22433:         const texts = { vehicles: null, staff: null, other: null };
22434:         const groups = Array.from(root?.querySelectorAll?.('[data-requirement-type]') || []);
22435:         for (const element of groups) {
22436:             const type = String(element.getAttribute('data-requirement-type') || '').toLowerCase();
22437:             const group = type === 'personnel' || type === 'staff' ? 'staff' : type === 'other' ? 'other' : type === 'vehicles' ? 'vehicles' : null;
22438:             if (!group) continue;
22439:             const raw = operationalRequirementNormaliseText(element.textContent || '');
22440:             if (!raw) continue;
22441:             texts[group] = texts[group]
22442:                 ? { raw: `${texts[group].raw}, ${raw}`, infoText: texts[group].infoText || '' }
22443:                 : { raw, infoText: operationalRequirementNormaliseText(element.getAttribute('data-info-text') || '') };
22444:         }
22445:         if (!groups.length) {
22446:             const raw = operationalRequirementNormaliseText(root?.textContent || '');
--- lines 22523-22783 ---
22523:     }
22524: 
22525:     function operationalRequirementsEnsureStyle(doc) {

22543: 
22544:     function operationalRequirementsPanelHtml(rows, model, settings, minified) {
22545:         const sorted = operationalRequirementsSortRows(rows, settings);
22546:         const open = sorted.filter(row => !row.covered);
22547:         const unresolved = OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS
22548:             .map(group => model?.requirementTexts?.[group]?.remaining)
22549:             .filter(Boolean);
22550:         const allCovered = open.length === 0 && unresolved.length === 0;
22551:         const bodyRows = sorted.map(row => {
22552:             const stillNeeded = Math.max(0, Number(row.remainingOnMission) - Number(row.selectedValue));
22553:             return `<tr class="mcms-operational-suite-row" data-covered="${row.covered ? 'true' : 'false'}"><td data-label="Requirement">${operationalRequirementsEscapeHtml(row.requirement || row.key)}</td><td data-label="Required">${Math.max(0, Number(row.missing) || 0).toLocaleString('en-GB')}</td><td data-label="Responding">${Math.max(0, Number(row.driving) || 0).toLocaleString('en-GB')}</td><td data-label="Selected">${operationalRequirementsEscapeHtml(operationalRequirementsSelectedText(row, settings?.calcMaxStaff === true))}</td><td class="mcms-operational-suite-needed" data-label="Still needed">${stillNeeded.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</td></tr>`;
22554:         }).join('');
22555:         const unresolvedHtml = unresolved.length
22556:             ? `<div class="mcms-operational-suite-unresolved"><strong>Unresolved MissionChief requirement</strong><br>${unresolved.map(operationalRequirementsEscapeHtml).join('<br>')}</div>`
22557:             : '';
22558:         const emptyHtml = bodyRows || unresolvedHtml ? '' : '<div class="mcms-operational-suite-unresolved">No active missing requirements reported.</div>';
22559:         return {
22560:             allCovered,
22561:             html: `<div class="mcms-operational-suite-header"><div class="mcms-operational-suite-title">Operational Requirements</div><div class="mcms-operational-suite-summary">${allCovered ? 'All displayed requirements covered' : `${open.length} requirement${open.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} still open${unresolved.length ? ` · ${unresolved.length} unresolved` : ''}`}</div><button type="button" class="mcms-operational-suite-toggle" aria-expanded="${minified ? 'false' : 'true'}" aria-label="${minified ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse'} operational requirements">${minified ? '＋' : '−'}</button></div><div class="mcms-operational-suite-body"><table class="mcms-operational-suite-table"><thead><tr><th>Requirement</th><th>Required</th><th>Responding</th><th>Selected</th><th>Still needed</th></tr></thead><tbody>${bodyRows}</tbody></table>${unresolvedHtml}${emptyHtml}</div>`
22562:         };
22563:     }
22564: 
22565:     function operationalRequirementsMount(context, requirementRoot) {
22566:         const doc = context.doc;
22567:         operationalRequirementsEnsureStyle(doc);
22568:         let panel = context.panel;
22569:         if (!panel?.isConnected) {
22570:             panel = doc.createElement('section');
22571:             panel.className = OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENTS_PANEL_CLASS;
22572:             panel.setAttribute('data-mcms-operational-suite', 'requirements');
22573:             panel.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
22574:             requirementRoot.parentNode?.insertBefore(panel, requirementRoot);
22575:             context.panel = panel;
22576:             panel.addEventListener('click', event => {
22577:                 const button = event.target?.closest?.('.mcms-operational-suite-toggle');
22578:                 if (!button) return;
22579:                 context.minified = !context.minified;
22580:                 context.fingerprint = '';
22581:                 operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, 0);
22582:             });
22583:         }
22584:         return panel;
22585:     }
22586: 
22587:     function operationalRequirementsRenderContext(context) {
22588:         if (!context?.doc || runtime.destroyed) return;
22589:         if (!operationalRequirementsActive()) {
22590:             context.panel?.remove?.();
22591:             context.panel = null;
22592:             return;
22593:         }
22594:         const requirementRoot = context.doc.querySelector?.('#missing_text');
22595:         if (!requirementRoot?.isConnected || operationalRequirementsEquivalentLssmActive(context.doc)) {
22596:             context.panel?.remove?.();
22597:             context.panel = null;
22598:             context.fingerprint = '';
22599:             return;
22600:         }
22601:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.requirements || {};
22602:         const model = operationalRequirementCreateModel(operationalRequirementsInput(context, requirementRoot));
22603:         const rows = operationalRequirementRows(model, { calcMaxStaff: settings.calcMaxStaff === true });
22604:         const fingerprint = JSON.stringify({
22605:             model: operationalRequirementFingerprint(model, { calcMaxStaff: settings.calcMaxStaff === true }),
22606:             sort: settings.sort,
22607:             sortDir: settings.sortDir,
22608:             viewMode: settings.viewMode,
22609:             minified: context.minified === true
22610:         });
22611:         if (fingerprint === context.fingerprint && context.panel?.isConnected) return;
22612:         const panel = operationalRequirementsMount(context, requirementRoot);
22613:         const rendered = operationalRequirementsPanelHtml(rows, model, settings, context.minified === true);
22614:         panel.dataset.covered = rendered.allCovered ? 'true' : 'false';
22615:         panel.dataset.minified = context.minified === true ? 'true' : 'false';
22616:         operationalReplaceContent(panel, rendered.html);
22617:         context.fingerprint = fingerprint;
22618:     }
22619: 
22620:     function operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, delay = 0) {
22621:         if (!context || runtime.destroyed) return;
22622:         runtimeClearTimeout(context.renderTimer);
22623:         context.renderTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
22624:             context.renderTimer = null;
22625:             operationalRequirementsRenderContext(context);
22626:             operationalFeatureRenderContext(context);
22627:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
22628:     }
22629: 
22630:     function operationalRequirementsBindContext(context) {
22631:         const doc = context?.doc;
22632:         if (!doc?.querySelector || !operationalRequirementsActive()) return;
22633:         const requirementRoot = doc.querySelector('#missing_text');
22634:         const roots = Array.from(new Set([
22635:             requirementRoot,
22636:             doc.querySelector('#mission_vehicle_driving'),
22637:             doc.querySelector('#vehicle_show_table_body_all'),
22638:             doc.querySelector('#occupied'),
22639:             ...operationalFeatureObservationRoots(doc)
22640:         ].filter(Boolean)));
22641:         if (!roots.length) return;
22642:         const rootFingerprint = roots.map(root => root).join('|');
22643:         if (context.boundRequirementRoot === requirementRoot && context.observer && context.observedRootCount === roots.length) return;
22644:         try { context.observer?.disconnect?.(); } catch (error) {}
22645:         context.boundRequirementRoot = requirementRoot;
22646:         context.observedRootCount = roots.length;
22647:         const OperationalMutationObserver = doc.defaultView?.MutationObserver || pageWindow.MutationObserver;
22648:         context.observer = new OperationalMutationObserver(() => operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, 25));
22649:         for (const root of roots) {
22650:             context.observer.observe(root, {
22651:                 childList: true,
22652:                 subtree: true,
22653:                 characterData: true,
22654:                 attributes: true,
22655:                 attributeFilter: ['checked', 'vehicle_type_id', 'data-vehicle-type-id', 'data-equipment-types', 'data-equipment-type', 'tractive_vehicle_id', 'tractive_random', 'sortvalue', 'value']
22656:             });
22657:         }
22658:         if (!context.changeHandler) {
22659:             context.changeHandler = event => {
22660:                 if (event.target?.matches?.('.vehicle_checkbox, #vehicle_show_table_body_all input, #occupied input')) {
22661:                     operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, 0);
22662:                 }
22663:             };
22664:             doc.addEventListener('change', context.changeHandler, true);
22665:         }
22666:     }
22667:     // Issue #378 end enhanced requirements runtime renderer.
22668: 
22669:     // Issue #378 complete operational feature suite.

22677:     const OP_LABELS = Object.freeze({
22678:         requirements: 'Enhanced requirements', callWindow: 'Extended Call Window',

22683:     function operationalQuery(root, selector) {
22684:         try { return root?.querySelector?.(selector) || null; } catch (error) { return null; }
22685:     }
22686:     function operationalQueryAll(root, selector) {
22687:         try { return Array.from(root?.querySelectorAll?.(selector) || []); } catch (error) { return []; }
22688:     }
22689:     function operationalEscape(value) {
22690:         return String(value ?? '').replace(/[&<>"']/gu, character => ({
22691:             '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;'
22692:         })[character]);
22693:     }
22694:     function operationalVisible(node) {
22695:         if (!node?.isConnected || node.hidden || node.disabled || node.getAttribute?.('aria-hidden') === 'true') return false;
22696:         try {
22697:             const style = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.getComputedStyle?.(node);
22698:             const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect?.();
22699:             return style?.display !== 'none' && style?.visibility !== 'hidden' && (!rect || rect.width > 0 || rect.height > 0);
22700:         } catch (error) { return true; }
22701:     }
22702:     function operationalFeatureState(context) {
22703:         let value = operationalFeatureContexts.get(context);
22704:         if (!value) {
22705:             value = { transportTokens: new Set(), route: '', arrHandlers: new Map() };
22706:             operationalFeatureContexts.set(context, value);
22707:         }
22708:         return value;
22709:     }
22710:     function operationalFeatureValue(path) {
22711:         return String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean).reduce((value, part) => value?.[part], state.operationalWindow);
22712:     }
22713:     function operationalFeatureSet(path, value) {
22714:         const parts = String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean);
22715:         let target = state.operationalWindow;
22716:         for (const part of parts.slice(0, -1)) target = target[part] ??= {};
22717:         target[parts.at(-1)] = value;
22718:     }
22719:     function operationalFeatureMissionId(row) {
22720:         return String(row?.dataset?.missionId || row?.id?.match(/mission[_-](\d+)/u)?.[1]
22721:             || operationalQuery(row, 'a[href*="/missions/"]')?.href?.match(/\/missions\/(\d+)/u)?.[1] || '');
22722:     }
22723:     function operationalFeatureNumber(node, names) {
22724:         for (const name of names) {
22725:             const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(node?.getAttribute?.(name) ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/gu, ''), 10);
22726:             if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
22727:         }
22728:         return 0;
22729:     }
22730:     function operationalFeatureOwn(node, kind) {
22731:         node?.setAttribute?.(OP_FEATURE_ATTR, kind);
22732:         return node;
22733:     }
22734:     function operationalFeatureRemove(context, prefix = '') {
22735:         const safe = String(prefix).replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/giu, '');
22736:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, safe ? `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}^="${safe}"]` : `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]`).forEach(node => node.remove());
22737:     }

22744:             </details>`).join('');

22752:         const json = [
22753:             'callWindow.tailoredTabs','callWindow.missionKeywords','callWindow.alarmIcons',

22759:     function operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi(panel = operationalQuery(document, `#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) {

22763:             else if (document.activeElement !== control) control.value = control.dataset.operationalType === 'json' ? JSON.stringify(value ?? []) : value ?? '';

22767:     function operationalReplaceContent(node, html) {
22768:         if (!node) return;
22769:         node.replaceChildren();

22771:         if (content) node.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', content);
22772:     }

01347:     function defaultOperationalWindowState(legacyRequirementsEnabled = true) {

01349:             schemaVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
01350:             enabled: true,
01351:             phase: 'operational-suite',
01352:             requirements: {
01353:                 enabled: legacyRequirementsEnabled !== false,
01354:                 calcMaxStaff: false,
01355:                 hoverTip: true,
01356:                 viewMode: 'table',
01357:                 overlay: false,
01358:                 minified: false,
01359:                 pushRight: false,
01360:                 sort: 'requirement',

01363:             },

01456: 
01457:     function operationalSuiteBoolean(value, fallback = false) {
01458:         return value === undefined || value === null ? Boolean(fallback) : Boolean(value);
01459:     }
01460: 
01461:     function operationalSuiteArray(value, fallback = []) {
01462:         return Array.isArray(value) ? value.slice() : fallback.slice();
01463:     }
01464: 
01465:     function normaliseOperationalWindowState(value, legacyRequirementsEnabled = true) {
01466:         const base = defaultOperationalWindowState(legacyRequirementsEnabled);
01467:         const parsed = value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value) ? value : {};
01468:         const requirements = parsed.requirements && typeof parsed.requirements === 'object' ? parsed.requirements : {};
01469:         const callWindow = parsed.callWindow && typeof parsed.callWindow === 'object' ? parsed.callWindow : {};
01470:         const missionList = parsed.missionList && typeof parsed.missionList === 'object' ? parsed.missionList : {};
01471:         const transport = parsed.transport && typeof parsed.transport === 'object' ? parsed.transport : {};
01472:         const migration = parsed.migration && typeof parsed.migration === 'object' ? parsed.migration : {};
01473:         const merged = {
01474:             ...base,
01475:             ...parsed,
01476:             schemaVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
01477:             phase: 'operational-suite',
01478:             requirements: { ...base.requirements, ...requirements },
01479:             callWindow: { ...base.callWindow, ...callWindow },
01480:             missionList: { ...base.missionList, ...missionList },
01481:             transport: { ...base.transport, ...transport },
01482:             migration: { ...base.migration, ...migration }
01483:         };
01484:         merged.enabled = parsed.phase === 'shell' ? true : operationalSuiteBoolean(parsed.enabled, parsed.phase === undefined);
01485:         merged.requirements.enabled = operationalSuiteBoolean(requirements.enabled, legacyRequirementsEnabled !== false);
01486:         merged.requirements.calcMaxStaff = operationalSuiteBoolean(requirements.calcMaxStaff, false);
01487:         merged.requirements.hoverTip = operationalSuiteBoolean(requirements.hoverTip, true);
01488:         merged.requirements.viewMode = ['table', 'text'].includes(String(requirements.viewMode)) ? String(requirements.viewMode) : 'table';
01489:         merged.requirements.overlay = operationalSuiteBoolean(requirements.overlay, false);
01490:         merged.requirements.minified = operationalSuiteBoolean(requirements.minified, false);
01491:         merged.requirements.pushRight = operationalSuiteBoolean(requirements.pushRight, false);
01492:         merged.requirements.sort = ['requirement', 'missing', 'driving', 'total', 'selected'].includes(String(requirements.sort)) ? String(requirements.sort) : 'requirement';
01493:         merged.requirements.sortDir = String(requirements.sortDir) === 'desc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';
01494:         merged.requirements.drag = {
01495:             ...base.requirements.drag,
01496:             ...(requirements.drag && typeof requirements.drag === 'object' ? requirements.drag : {}),
01497:             offset: {
01498:                 ...base.requirements.drag.offset,
01499:                 ...(requirements.drag?.offset && typeof requirements.drag.offset === 'object' ? requirements.drag.offset : {})
01500:             }
01501:         };
01502:         const callWindowBooleanKeys = [
01503:             'enabled', 'generationDate', 'redBorder', 'patientSummary', 'collapsiblePatients',
01504:             'arrCounter', 'arrCounterAsBadge', 'arrClickHighlight', 'arrCounterResetSelection',
01505:             'arrMatchHighlight', 'arrMatchHighlightAllWords', 'arrTime', 'arrSpecs', 'alarmTime',
01506:             'stickyHeader', 'loadMoreVehiclesInHeader', 'hideVehicleList', 'centerMap',
--- lines 22954-23214 ---
22954:             if (settings.averageCredits && record.credits) badges.push(`Avg ${record.credits.toLocaleString('en-GB')}`);
22955:             if (settings.remainingTime && record.time) badges.push(`Time ${record.time}s`);
22956:             if (badges.length) { const badge = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('div'), `list-badges-${record.id}`); badge.className = 'mcms-operational-bar'; operationalReplaceContent(badge, badges.map(text => `<span class="mcms-operational-pill">${operationalEscape(text)}</span>`).join('')); record.row.appendChild(badge); }
22957:         });
22958:         if (settings.sortMissions) operationalMissionListComputeOrder(records, settings.sortMissionsType, settings.sortMissionsDirection, settings.starredMissions).forEach(record => record.row.parentNode?.appendChild(record.row));
22959:     }
22960: 
22961:     function operationalTransportChooseAction(route, candidates, settings, usedTokens = []) {
22962:         const mission = /^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(route); const vehicle = /^\/vehicles\/\d+(?:\/(?:patient|gefangener|prisoner)\/\d+)?\/?$/u.test(route);
22963:         const mode = settings?.enabled && mission && settings.autoOpenTransportRequest ? 'open' : settings?.enabled && vehicle && settings.autoClickSuccessButtons ? 'success' : '';
22964:         const used = new Set((usedTokens || []).map(String));
22965:         const eligible = (candidates || []).filter(item => item?.mode === mode && item.visible !== false && item.disabled !== true && !used.has(String(item.token || '')));
22966:         return eligible.length === 1 ? eligible[0] : null;
22967:     }
22968:     function operationalTransportApply(context) {
22969:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.transport || {}; const doc = context.doc;
22970:         if (!settings.enabled || operationalQuery(doc, '[data-module="enhancedTransportRequests"]')) return;
22971:         const feature = operationalFeatureState(context); const route = String(doc.defaultView?.location?.pathname || '');
22972:         if (feature.route !== route) { feature.route = route; feature.transportTokens.clear(); }
22973:         const mission = /^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(route); const vehicle = /^\/vehicles\/\d+(?:\/(?:patient|gefangener|prisoner)\/\d+)?\/?$/u.test(route);
22974:         const selector = mission ? 'a[href*="/patient/"],a[href*="/gefangener/"],a[href*="/prisoner/"],a[href*="transport"],button[data-action*="transport"],.transport_request' : vehicle ? 'a.btn-success,button.btn-success,input.btn-success' : '';
22975:         const mode = mission ? 'open' : 'success';
22976:         const candidates = selector ? operationalQueryAll(doc, selector).filter(node => /transport|hospital|prison|patient|continue|confirm|select/i.test(String(node.textContent || node.value || node.title || node.getAttribute?.('href') || ''))).map(node => ({
22977:             node, mode, visible: operationalVisible(node), disabled: Boolean(node.disabled || node.classList?.contains('disabled') || node.getAttribute?.('aria-disabled') === 'true'),
22978:             token: `${route}|${mode}|${node.id || node.getAttribute?.('href') || node.textContent || node.value}`
22979:         })) : [];
22980:         const action = operationalTransportChooseAction(route, candidates, settings, feature.transportTokens);
22981:         if (!action?.node) return; feature.transportTokens.add(action.token);
22982:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => { if (!runtime.destroyed && operationalVisible(action.node)) action.node.click(); }, 80);
22983:     }
22984: 
22985:     function operationalFeatureObservationRoots(doc) {
22986:         return [operationalMissionListRoot(doc), operationalQuery(doc, '#mission_patients,.mission_patients'), operationalQuery(doc, '#aao,#aao_search_results,.aao-container'), operationalQuery(doc, '#mission_general_info,.mission_general_info'), operationalQuery(doc, '.vehicle_patient_select,.vehicle_prisoner_select')].filter(Boolean);
22987:     }
22988:     function operationalFeatureRenderContext(context) {
22989:         if (!context?.doc || runtime.destroyed || !operationalSuiteEnabled()) return;
22990:         operationalCallWindowApply(context); operationalMissionListApply(context); operationalTransportApply(context);
22991:     }
22992:     function operationalFeatureCleanupContext(context) {
22993:         const feature = operationalFeatureContexts.get(context);
22994:         for (const [row, previous] of feature?.arrHandlers || []) { try { row.onclick = previous || null; } catch (error) {} }
22995:         operationalFeatureRemove(context);
22996:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, '[data-mcms-operational-sticky="true"]').forEach(node => { node.style.removeProperty('position'); node.style.removeProperty('top'); node.style.removeProperty('z-index'); delete node.dataset.mcmsOperationalSticky; });
22997:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, '.mcms-operational-starred,.mcms-operational-collapsed,.mcms-operational-patient-hidden,.mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden,.mcms-operational-arr-match').forEach(node => node.classList.remove('mcms-operational-starred','mcms-operational-collapsed','mcms-operational-patient-hidden','mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden','mcms-operational-arr-match'));
22998:         operationalFeatureContexts.delete(context);
22999:     }
23000:     // Issue #378 end complete operational feature suite.
23001: 
23002: 
23003:     // Issue #378 LSSM operational-suite lifecycle shell.
23004:     // This phase owns settings, context identity, scheduling and teardown only. It must not
23005:     // render a second requirements surface while the legacy Matrix remains the stable runtime.
23006:     function operationalSuiteEnabled() {
23007:         return state.operationalWindow?.enabled === true;
23008:     }
23009: 
23010:     function operationalSuiteDocumentContexts() {
23011:         const contexts = [];
23012:         const seen = new Set();
23013:         for (const candidate of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23014:             const doc = candidate?.doc;
23015:             if (!doc?.querySelector || seen.has(doc)) continue;
23016:             seen.add(doc);
23017:             contexts.push(doc);
23018:         }
23019:         return contexts;
23020:     }
23021: 
23022:     function operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context) {
23023:         if (!context) return;
23024:         operationalFeatureCleanupContext(context);
23025:         try { context.observer?.disconnect?.(); } catch (err) {}
23026:         context.observer = null;
23027:         runtimeClearTimeout(context.renderTimer);
23028:         context.renderTimer = null;
23029:         if (context.changeHandler && context.doc) context.doc.removeEventListener('change', context.changeHandler, true);
23030:         context.changeHandler = null;
23031:         context.panel?.remove?.();
23032:         context.panel = null;
23033:         context.root = null;
23034:         if (context.doc) operationalSuiteContexts.delete(context.doc);
23035:         context.doc = null;
23036:     }
23037: 
23038:     function clearOperationalSuiteContexts() {
23039:         for (const context of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.values())) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
23040:         operationalSuiteContexts.clear();
23041:     }
23042: 
23043:     function operationalSuiteEnsureContext(doc) {
23044:         if (!doc?.querySelector) return null;
23045:         const existing = operationalSuiteContexts.get(doc);
23046:         if (existing) {
23047:             existing.root = doc.documentElement || doc.body || existing.root;
23048:             existing.seenAt = Date.now();
23049:             operationalRequirementsBindContext(existing);
23050:             return existing;
23051:         }
23052:         const context = {
23053:             doc,
23054:             root: doc.documentElement || doc.body || null,
23055:             observer: null,
23056:             renderTimer: null,
23057:             changeHandler: null,
23058:             panel: null,
23059:             fingerprint: '',
23060:             minified: state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.minified === true,
23061:             boundRequirementRoot: null,
23062:             observedRootCount: 0,
23063:             generation: 0,
23064:             seenAt: Date.now(),
23065:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE.commit
23066:         };
23067:         operationalSuiteContexts.set(doc, context);
23068:         operationalRequirementsBindContext(context);
23069:         return context;
23070:     }
23071: 
23072:     function scanOperationalSuiteShell() {
23073:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
23074:         if (!operationalSuiteEnabled()) {
23075:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
23076:             return;
23077:         }
23078:         const activeDocuments = new Set();
23079:         for (const doc of operationalSuiteDocumentContexts()) {
23080:             const context = operationalSuiteEnsureContext(doc);
23081:             if (!context) continue;
23082:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
23083:             context.generation = ++operationalSuiteRevision;
23084:             operationalRequirementsBindContext(context);
23085:             operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, 0);
23086:         }
23087:         for (const [doc, context] of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.entries())) {
23088:             if (!activeDocuments.has(doc) || context.root?.isConnected === false) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
23089:         }
23090:     }
23091: 
23092:     function scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(delay = 0) {
23093:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
23094:         runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
23095:         operationalSuiteScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
23096:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
23097:             try {
23098:                 scanOperationalSuiteShell();
23099:             } catch (error) {
23100:                 console.error(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Operational suite scan failed without blocking the Toolkit menu.`, error);
23101:             }
23102:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
23103:     }
23104: 
23105:     function installOperationalSuiteShell() {
23106:         if (operationalSuiteInstalled) {
23107:             if (operationalSuiteEnabled() && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
23108:             return;
23109:         }
23110:         operationalSuiteInstalled = true;
23111:         runtime.operationalSuite = Object.freeze({
23112:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE,
23113:             settingsVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
23114:             phase: 'operational-suite',
23115:             schedule: scheduleOperationalSuiteScan,
23116:             contextCount: () => operationalSuiteContexts.size
23117:         });
23118:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
23119:             runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
23120:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
23121:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
23122:             if (runtime.operationalSuite?.phase === 'operational-suite') delete runtime.operationalSuite;
23123:         });
23124:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled() && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
23125:     }
23126: 
23127:     // Issue #378 retained UK operational capability catalogue.

23129: const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_DEFAULT_STAFF_BY_TYPE = Object.freeze({"0":[1,9],"1":[1,5],"2":[1,3],"3":[1,3],"4":[1,5],"5":[1,2],"6":[1,3],"7":[1,6],"8":[1,2],"9":[3,5],"12":[1,2],"13":[1,4],"14":[1,3],"15":[1,6],"16":[1,9],"17":[1,6],"18":[1,1],"19":[1,3],"20":[1,1],"23":[1,12],"24":[1,2],"25":[1,2],"26":[1,3],"27":[1,2],"28":[1,2],"31":[1,2],"34":[1,1],"35":[1,2],"36":[1,2],"37":[2,9],"38":[2,9],"39":[1,6],"40":[1,2],"51":[1,9],"52":[1,9],"53":[1,4],"55":[1,8],"56":[1,6],"81":[0,0],"82":[1,2],"83":[1,1],"85":[1,3],"86":[1,3],"87":[0,0],"92":[1,1],"93":[1,1],"95":[1,2],"96":[1,2],"99":[1,4],"100":[1,3],"101":[1,1],"102":[1,1],"116":[1,5]});
23130: const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_TRACTIVE_TYPES = Object.freeze({"84":[0,1,4],"87":[85,86,89,94],"88":[85,86,89,94]});
23131:     function handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target) {
23132:         const path = target?.dataset?.operationalSetting;
23133:         if (!path) return false;
23134:         try {
23135:             const type = target.dataset.operationalType;
23136:             const value = type === 'boolean' ? target.checked : type === 'json' ? JSON.parse(target.value || '[]') : target.value;
23137:             operationalFeatureSet(path, value);
23138:             state.operationalWindow = normaliseOperationalWindowState(state.operationalWindow, state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false);
23139:             saveState(); updateUI(); showToast('Operational Window setting saved');
23140:         } catch (error) {
23141:             showToast('Operational setting contains invalid JSON');
23142:         }
23143:         return true;
23144:     }
23145: 
23146:     // Issue #391: legacy Mission Requirements Matrix retired; operationalWindow is authoritative.
23147: 
23148:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
23149:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
23150:     }
23151: 
23152:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
23153:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
23154:     }
23155: 
23156:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
23157:         let total = 0;
23158:         let known = 0;
23159:         let unknown = 0;
23160:         let eligible = 0;
23161:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
23162:         const sources = new Map();
23163:         for (const entry of entries) {
23164:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
23165:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
23166:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
23167:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
23168:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
23169:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
23170:             const value = details.value;
23171:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
23172:                 unknown += 1;
23173:                 continue;
23174:             }
23175:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
23176:             known += 1;
23177:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
23178:         }
23179:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
23180:     }
23181: 
23182:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
23183:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
23184:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
23185:     }
23186: 
23187:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
23188:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
23189:     }
23190: 
23191:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
23192:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
23193:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
23194:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
23195:     }
23196: 
23197:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
23198:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
23199:         const noScene = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => Boolean(entry?.units?.known) && Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onScene) || 0) === 0);
23200:         const assistance = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === 'assistance');
23201:         const visible = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries);
23202:         const mode = selectedCriticalValueMode();
23203:         const showingText = `${mode === 'eligible' ? 'Eligible' : 'Total'} MissionChief average credits for ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} currently visible mission${visibleEntries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
23204:         const valueCard = (className, label, group) => `<div class="mcms-critical-value-card ${className}" title="${escapeHtml(criticalValueTitle(label, group))}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(criticalValueDisplay(group))}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(criticalValueCoverage(group))}</small></div>`;
23205:         return `
23206:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-label" title="${escapeHtml(showingText)}"><strong>MISSION</strong><span>VALUE</span></div>
23207:             <div class="mcms-critical-value-mode" role="group" aria-label="Mission value mode">
23208:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="total" class="${mode === 'total' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'total'}">TOTAL</button>
23209:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="eligible" class="${mode === 'eligible' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'eligible'}">ELIGIBLE</button>
23210:             </div>
23211:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-grid">
23212:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-no-scene', 'No Scene', noScene)}
23213:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-assistance', 'Assistance', assistance)}
23214:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-all', 'Visible Value', visible)}
--- lines 22959-23219 ---
22959:     }
22960: 
22961:     function operationalTransportChooseAction(route, candidates, settings, usedTokens = []) {
22962:         const mission = /^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(route); const vehicle = /^\/vehicles\/\d+(?:\/(?:patient|gefangener|prisoner)\/\d+)?\/?$/u.test(route);
22963:         const mode = settings?.enabled && mission && settings.autoOpenTransportRequest ? 'open' : settings?.enabled && vehicle && settings.autoClickSuccessButtons ? 'success' : '';
22964:         const used = new Set((usedTokens || []).map(String));
22965:         const eligible = (candidates || []).filter(item => item?.mode === mode && item.visible !== false && item.disabled !== true && !used.has(String(item.token || '')));
22966:         return eligible.length === 1 ? eligible[0] : null;
22967:     }
22968:     function operationalTransportApply(context) {
22969:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.transport || {}; const doc = context.doc;
22970:         if (!settings.enabled || operationalQuery(doc, '[data-module="enhancedTransportRequests"]')) return;
22971:         const feature = operationalFeatureState(context); const route = String(doc.defaultView?.location?.pathname || '');
22972:         if (feature.route !== route) { feature.route = route; feature.transportTokens.clear(); }
22973:         const mission = /^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(route); const vehicle = /^\/vehicles\/\d+(?:\/(?:patient|gefangener|prisoner)\/\d+)?\/?$/u.test(route);
22974:         const selector = mission ? 'a[href*="/patient/"],a[href*="/gefangener/"],a[href*="/prisoner/"],a[href*="transport"],button[data-action*="transport"],.transport_request' : vehicle ? 'a.btn-success,button.btn-success,input.btn-success' : '';
22975:         const mode = mission ? 'open' : 'success';
22976:         const candidates = selector ? operationalQueryAll(doc, selector).filter(node => /transport|hospital|prison|patient|continue|confirm|select/i.test(String(node.textContent || node.value || node.title || node.getAttribute?.('href') || ''))).map(node => ({
22977:             node, mode, visible: operationalVisible(node), disabled: Boolean(node.disabled || node.classList?.contains('disabled') || node.getAttribute?.('aria-disabled') === 'true'),
22978:             token: `${route}|${mode}|${node.id || node.getAttribute?.('href') || node.textContent || node.value}`
22979:         })) : [];
22980:         const action = operationalTransportChooseAction(route, candidates, settings, feature.transportTokens);
22981:         if (!action?.node) return; feature.transportTokens.add(action.token);
22982:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => { if (!runtime.destroyed && operationalVisible(action.node)) action.node.click(); }, 80);
22983:     }
22984: 
22985:     function operationalFeatureObservationRoots(doc) {
22986:         return [operationalMissionListRoot(doc), operationalQuery(doc, '#mission_patients,.mission_patients'), operationalQuery(doc, '#aao,#aao_search_results,.aao-container'), operationalQuery(doc, '#mission_general_info,.mission_general_info'), operationalQuery(doc, '.vehicle_patient_select,.vehicle_prisoner_select')].filter(Boolean);
22987:     }
22988:     function operationalFeatureRenderContext(context) {
22989:         if (!context?.doc || runtime.destroyed || !operationalSuiteEnabled()) return;
22990:         operationalCallWindowApply(context); operationalMissionListApply(context); operationalTransportApply(context);
22991:     }
22992:     function operationalFeatureCleanupContext(context) {
22993:         const feature = operationalFeatureContexts.get(context);
22994:         for (const [row, previous] of feature?.arrHandlers || []) { try { row.onclick = previous || null; } catch (error) {} }
22995:         operationalFeatureRemove(context);
22996:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, '[data-mcms-operational-sticky="true"]').forEach(node => { node.style.removeProperty('position'); node.style.removeProperty('top'); node.style.removeProperty('z-index'); delete node.dataset.mcmsOperationalSticky; });
22997:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, '.mcms-operational-starred,.mcms-operational-collapsed,.mcms-operational-patient-hidden,.mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden,.mcms-operational-arr-match').forEach(node => node.classList.remove('mcms-operational-starred','mcms-operational-collapsed','mcms-operational-patient-hidden','mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden','mcms-operational-arr-match'));
22998:         operationalFeatureContexts.delete(context);
22999:     }
23000:     // Issue #378 end complete operational feature suite.
23001: 
23002: 
23003:     // Issue #378 LSSM operational-suite lifecycle shell.
23004:     // This phase owns settings, context identity, scheduling and teardown only. It must not
23005:     // render a second requirements surface while the legacy Matrix remains the stable runtime.
23006:     function operationalSuiteEnabled() {
23007:         return state.operationalWindow?.enabled === true;
23008:     }
23009: 
23010:     function operationalSuiteDocumentContexts() {
23011:         const contexts = [];
23012:         const seen = new Set();
23013:         for (const candidate of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23014:             const doc = candidate?.doc;
23015:             if (!doc?.querySelector || seen.has(doc)) continue;
23016:             seen.add(doc);
23017:             contexts.push(doc);
23018:         }
23019:         return contexts;
23020:     }
23021: 
23022:     function operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context) {
23023:         if (!context) return;
23024:         operationalFeatureCleanupContext(context);
23025:         try { context.observer?.disconnect?.(); } catch (err) {}
23026:         context.observer = null;
23027:         runtimeClearTimeout(context.renderTimer);
23028:         context.renderTimer = null;
23029:         if (context.changeHandler && context.doc) context.doc.removeEventListener('change', context.changeHandler, true);
23030:         context.changeHandler = null;
23031:         context.panel?.remove?.();
23032:         context.panel = null;
23033:         context.root = null;
23034:         if (context.doc) operationalSuiteContexts.delete(context.doc);
23035:         context.doc = null;
23036:     }
23037: 
23038:     function clearOperationalSuiteContexts() {
23039:         for (const context of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.values())) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
23040:         operationalSuiteContexts.clear();
23041:     }
23042: 
23043:     function operationalSuiteEnsureContext(doc) {
23044:         if (!doc?.querySelector) return null;
23045:         const existing = operationalSuiteContexts.get(doc);
23046:         if (existing) {
23047:             existing.root = doc.documentElement || doc.body || existing.root;
23048:             existing.seenAt = Date.now();
23049:             operationalRequirementsBindContext(existing);
23050:             return existing;
23051:         }
23052:         const context = {
23053:             doc,
23054:             root: doc.documentElement || doc.body || null,
23055:             observer: null,
23056:             renderTimer: null,
23057:             changeHandler: null,
23058:             panel: null,
23059:             fingerprint: '',
23060:             minified: state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.minified === true,
23061:             boundRequirementRoot: null,
23062:             observedRootCount: 0,
23063:             generation: 0,
23064:             seenAt: Date.now(),
23065:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE.commit
23066:         };
23067:         operationalSuiteContexts.set(doc, context);
23068:         operationalRequirementsBindContext(context);
23069:         return context;
23070:     }
23071: 
23072:     function scanOperationalSuiteShell() {
23073:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
23074:         if (!operationalSuiteEnabled()) {
23075:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
23076:             return;
23077:         }
23078:         const activeDocuments = new Set();
23079:         for (const doc of operationalSuiteDocumentContexts()) {
23080:             const context = operationalSuiteEnsureContext(doc);
23081:             if (!context) continue;
23082:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
23083:             context.generation = ++operationalSuiteRevision;
23084:             operationalRequirementsBindContext(context);
23085:             operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, 0);
23086:         }
23087:         for (const [doc, context] of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.entries())) {
23088:             if (!activeDocuments.has(doc) || context.root?.isConnected === false) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
23089:         }
23090:     }
23091: 
23092:     function scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(delay = 0) {
23093:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
23094:         runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
23095:         operationalSuiteScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
23096:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
23097:             try {
23098:                 scanOperationalSuiteShell();
23099:             } catch (error) {
23100:                 console.error(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Operational suite scan failed without blocking the Toolkit menu.`, error);
23101:             }
23102:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
23103:     }
23104: 
23105:     function installOperationalSuiteShell() {
23106:         if (operationalSuiteInstalled) {
23107:             if (operationalSuiteEnabled() && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
23108:             return;
23109:         }
23110:         operationalSuiteInstalled = true;
23111:         runtime.operationalSuite = Object.freeze({
23112:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE,
23113:             settingsVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
23114:             phase: 'operational-suite',
23115:             schedule: scheduleOperationalSuiteScan,
23116:             contextCount: () => operationalSuiteContexts.size
23117:         });
23118:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
23119:             runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
23120:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
23121:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
23122:             if (runtime.operationalSuite?.phase === 'operational-suite') delete runtime.operationalSuite;
23123:         });
23124:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled() && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
23125:     }
23126:
