23130: const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_TRACTIVE_TYPES = Object.freeze({"84":[0,1,4],"87":[85,86,89,94],"88":[85,86,89,94]});
23131:     function handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target) {
23132:         const path = target?.dataset?.operationalSetting;
23133:         if (!path) return false;
23134:         try {
23135:             const type = target.dataset.operationalType;
23136:             const value = type === 'boolean' ? target.checked : type === 'json' ? JSON.parse(target.value || '[]') : target.value;
23137:             operationalFeatureSet(path, value);
23138:             state.operationalWindow = normaliseOperationalWindowState(state.operationalWindow, state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false);
23139:             saveState(); updateUI(); showToast('Operational Window setting saved');
23140:         } catch (error) {
23141:             showToast('Operational setting contains invalid JSON');
23142:         }
23143:         return true;
23144:     }
23145: 
23146:     // Issue #391: legacy Mission Requirements Matrix retired; operationalWindow is authoritative.
23147: 
23148:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
23149:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
23150:     }
23151: 
23152:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
23153:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
23154:     }
23155: 
23156:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
23157:         let total = 0;
23158:         let known = 0;
23159:         let unknown = 0;
23160:         let eligible = 0;
23161:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
23162:         const sources = new Map();
23163:         for (const entry of entries) {
23164:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
23165:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
23166:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
23167:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
23168:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
23169:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
23170:             const value = details.value;
23171:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
23172:                 unknown += 1;
23173:                 continue;
23174:             }
23175:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
23176:             known += 1;
23177:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
23178:         }
23179:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
23180:     }
23181: 
23182:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
23183:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
23184:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
23185:     }
23186: 
23187:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
23188:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
23189:     }
23190: 
23191:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
23192:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
23193:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
23194:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
23195:     }
23196: 
23197:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
23198:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
23199:         const noScene = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => Boolean(entry?.units?.known) && Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onScene) || 0) === 0);
23200:         const assistance = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === 'assistance');
23201:         const visible = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries);
23202:         const mode = selectedCriticalValueMode();
23203:         const showingText = `${mode === 'eligible' ? 'Eligible' : 'Total'} MissionChief average credits for ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} currently visible mission${visibleEntries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
23204:         const valueCard = (className, label, group) => `<div class="mcms-critical-value-card ${className}" title="${escapeHtml(criticalValueTitle(label, group))}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(criticalValueDisplay(group))}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(criticalValueCoverage(group))}</small></div>`;
23205:         return `
23206:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-label" title="${escapeHtml(showingText)}"><strong>MISSION</strong><span>VALUE</span></div>
23207:             <div class="mcms-critical-value-mode" role="group" aria-label="Mission value mode">
23208:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="total" class="${mode === 'total' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'total'}">TOTAL</button>
23209:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="eligible" class="${mode === 'eligible' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'eligible'}">ELIGIBLE</button>
23210:             </div>
23211:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-grid">
23212:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-no-scene', 'No Scene', noScene)}
23213:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-assistance', 'Assistance', assistance)}
23214:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-all', 'Visible Value', visible)}
23215:             </div>
23216:             <span class="mcms-critical-showing">SHOWING ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} OF ${allEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} MISSIONS</span>`;
23217:     }
23218: 
23219:     function criticalSummaryHtml(allEntries) {
23220:         const baseForStatus = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['status']);
23221:         const baseForOnWay = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['onway']);
23222:         const baseForMyUnits = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['myunits']);
23223:         const statusCounts = { all: baseForStatus.length, attention: 0, 'no-scene': 0, assistance: 0, clearing: 0, 'on-scene': 0, syncing: 0 };
23224:         for (const entry of baseForStatus) {
23225:             const key = criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry);
23226:             if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(statusCounts, key)) statusCounts[key] += 1;
23227:             if (key === 'no-scene' || key === 'assistance') statusCounts.attention += 1;
23228:         }
23229:         let onWayMissions = 0;
23230:         let onWayVehicles = 0;
23231:         for (const entry of baseForOnWay) {
23232:             const count = Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onWay ?? entry?.units?.travelling) || 0);
23233:             if (count > 0) onWayMissions += 1;
23234:             onWayVehicles += count;
23235:         }
23236:         const selectedStatus = selectedCriticalPrimaryStatus();
23237:         const statusCard = (key, className, label, value, title = '') => {
23238:             const active = selectedStatus === key;
23239:             return `<button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter ${className}${active ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-primary-status="${escapeHtml(key)}" aria-pressed="${active ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="${escapeHtml(title || `Show ${label} missions`)}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${Number(value).toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${active ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>`;
23240:         };
23241:         const onWayActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.hasVehiclesOnWay);
23242:         const myUnitsActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.onlyMyUnits);
23243:         return `
23244:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
23245:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>MISSION CONDITION</strong><small>Select one condition</small></div>
23246:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-status-grid">
23247:                     ${statusCard('all', 'mcms-summary-aged', 'Any Status', statusCounts.all)}
23248:                     ${statusCard('attention', 'mcms-summary-attention', 'Attention', statusCounts.attention, 'Show missions with no units on scene or detected assistance requirements')}
23249:                     ${statusCard('no-scene', 'mcms-summary-no-scene', 'No Units', statusCounts['no-scene'])}
23250:                     ${statusCard('assistance', 'mcms-summary-assistance', 'Assistance', statusCounts.assistance)}
23251:                     ${statusCard('clearing', 'mcms-summary-clearing', 'Clearing', statusCounts.clearing)}
23252:                     ${statusCard('on-scene', 'mcms-summary-on-scene', 'Stable', statusCounts['on-scene'])}
23253:                 </div>
23254:             </section>
23255:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
23256:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>UNIT SCOPE</strong><small>Optional additional requirements</small></div>
23257:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-condition-grid">
23258:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-enroute${onWayActive ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-condition="onway" aria-pressed="${onWayActive ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="Require at least one Code 3 vehicle responding"><span>Vehicles On Way</span><strong>${onWayMissions.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><small>${onWayVehicles.toLocaleString('en-GB')} vehicles</small><i aria-hidden="true">${onWayActive ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>
23259:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-my-units${myUnitsActive ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-condition="my-units" aria-pressed="${myUnitsActive ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="Show only missions with one of your units committed"><span>Only My Units</span><strong>${baseForMyUnits.filter(criticalEntryHasMyUnits).length.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${myUnitsActive ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>
23260:                 </div>
23261:             </section>
23262:             ${statusCounts.syncing ? `<div class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-summary-syncing" title="Vehicle data is still loading for these missions"><span>Syncing Data</span><strong>${statusCounts.syncing.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong></div>` : ''}`;
23263:     }
23264: 
23265:     function nativeMissionCountdownText(missionId) {
23266:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
23267:         if (id === null) return '';
23268:         const node = document.getElementById(`mission_overview_countdown_${id}`)
23269:             || document.querySelector(`#mission_${id} [id^="mission_overview_countdown_"], #mission_${id} .mission_overview_countdown, #mission_${id} .mission-countdown`);
23270:         const text = String(node?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
23271:         return text && !/^[-—]+$/u.test(text) ? text : '';
23272:     }
23273: 
23274:     function formatMissionCountdown(ms) {
23275:         const seconds = Math.max(0, Math.ceil(Number(ms) / 1000));
23276:         const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
23277:         const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
23278:         const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60;
23279:         if (hours > 0) return `${hours}:${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
23280:         return `${minutes}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
23281:     }
23282: 
23283:     function normaliseMissionTimestampMs(value) {
23284:         const number = Number(value);
23285:         if (!Number.isFinite(number) || number <= 0) return null;
23286:         return number < 100000000000 ? number * 1000 : number;
23287:     }
23288: 
23289:     function missionGameNowMs(snapshot = null) {
23290:         try {
23291:             if (typeof pageWindow.unix_timestamp === 'function') {
23292:                 const value = Number(pageWindow.unix_timestamp());
23293:                 if (Number.isFinite(value) && value > 0) return value < 100000000000 ? value * 1000 : value;
23294:             }
23295:         } catch (err) {}
23296:         const snapshotNow = normaliseMissionTimestampMs(snapshot?.dateNow);
===== installOperationalSuiteShell =====
--- lines 23025-23285 ---
23025:         try { context.observer?.disconnect?.(); } catch (err) {}
23026:         context.observer = null;
23027:         runtimeClearTimeout(context.renderTimer);
23028:         context.renderTimer = null;
23029:         if (context.changeHandler && context.doc) context.doc.removeEventListener('change', context.changeHandler, true);
23030:         context.changeHandler = null;
23031:         context.panel?.remove?.();
23032:         context.panel = null;
23033:         context.root = null;
23034:         if (context.doc) operationalSuiteContexts.delete(context.doc);
23035:         context.doc = null;
23036:     }
23037: 
23038:     function clearOperationalSuiteContexts() {
23039:         for (const context of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.values())) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
23040:         operationalSuiteContexts.clear();
23041:     }
23042: 
23043:     function operationalSuiteEnsureContext(doc) {
23044:         if (!doc?.querySelector) return null;
23045:         const existing = operationalSuiteContexts.get(doc);
23046:         if (existing) {
23047:             existing.root = doc.documentElement || doc.body || existing.root;
23048:             existing.seenAt = Date.now();
23049:             operationalRequirementsBindContext(existing);
23050:             return existing;
23051:         }
23052:         const context = {
23053:             doc,
23054:             root: doc.documentElement || doc.body || null,
23055:             observer: null,
23056:             renderTimer: null,
23057:             changeHandler: null,
23058:             panel: null,
23059:             fingerprint: '',
23060:             minified: state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.minified === true,
23061:             boundRequirementRoot: null,
23062:             observedRootCount: 0,
23063:             generation: 0,
23064:             seenAt: Date.now(),
23065:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE.commit
23066:         };
23067:         operationalSuiteContexts.set(doc, context);
23068:         operationalRequirementsBindContext(context);
23069:         return context;
23070:     }
23071: 
23072:     function scanOperationalSuiteShell() {
23073:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
23074:         if (!operationalSuiteEnabled()) {
23075:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
23076:             return;
23077:         }
23078:         const activeDocuments = new Set();
23079:         for (const doc of operationalSuiteDocumentContexts()) {
23080:             const context = operationalSuiteEnsureContext(doc);
23081:             if (!context) continue;
23082:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
23083:             context.generation = ++operationalSuiteRevision;
23084:             operationalRequirementsBindContext(context);
23085:             operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, 0);
23086:         }
23087:         for (const [doc, context] of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.entries())) {
23088:             if (!activeDocuments.has(doc) || context.root?.isConnected === false) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
23089:         }
23090:     }
23091: 
23092:     function scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(delay = 0) {
23093:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
23094:         runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
23095:         operationalSuiteScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
23096:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
23097:             try {
23098:                 scanOperationalSuiteShell();
23099:             } catch (error) {
23100:                 console.error(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Operational suite scan failed without blocking the Toolkit menu.`, error);
23101:             }
23102:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
23103:     }
23104: 
23105:     function installOperationalSuiteShell() {
23106:         if (operationalSuiteInstalled) {
23107:             if (operationalSuiteEnabled() && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
23108:             return;
23109:         }
23110:         operationalSuiteInstalled = true;
23111:         runtime.operationalSuite = Object.freeze({
23112:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE,
23113:             settingsVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
23114:             phase: 'operational-suite',
23115:             schedule: scheduleOperationalSuiteScan,
23116:             contextCount: () => operationalSuiteContexts.size
23117:         });
23118:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
23119:             runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
23120:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
23121:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
23122:             if (runtime.operationalSuite?.phase === 'operational-suite') delete runtime.operationalSuite;
23123:         });
23124:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled() && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
23125:     }

23129: const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_DEFAULT_STAFF_BY_TYPE = Object.freeze({"0":[1,9],"1":[1,5],"2":[1,3],"3":[1,3],"4":[1,5],"5":[1,2],"6":[1,3],"7":[1,6],"8":[1,2],"9":[3,5],"12":[1,2],"13":[1,4],"14":[1,3],"15":[1,6],"16":[1,9],"17":[1,6],"18":[1,1],"19":[1,3],"20":[1,1],"23":[1,12],"24":[1,2],"25":[1,2],"26":[1,3],"27":[1,2],"28":[1,2],"31":[1,2],"34":[1,1],"35":[1,2],"36":[1,2],"37":[2,9],"38":[2,9],"39":[1,6],"40":[1,2],"51":[1,9],"52":[1,9],"53":[1,4],"55":[1,8],"56":[1,6],"81":[0,0],"82":[1,2],"83":[1,1],"85":[1,3],"86":[1,3],"87":[0,0],"92":[1,1],"93":[1,1],"95":[1,2],"96":[1,2],"99":[1,4],"100":[1,3],"101":[1,1],"102":[1,1],"116":[1,5]});
23130: const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_TRACTIVE_TYPES = Object.freeze({"84":[0,1,4],"87":[85,86,89,94],"88":[85,86,89,94]});
23131:     function handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target) {
23132:         const path = target?.dataset?.operationalSetting;
23133:         if (!path) return false;
23134:         try {
23135:             const type = target.dataset.operationalType;
23136:             const value = type === 'boolean' ? target.checked : type === 'json' ? JSON.parse(target.value || '[]') : target.value;
23137:             operationalFeatureSet(path, value);
23138:             state.operationalWindow = normaliseOperationalWindowState(state.operationalWindow, state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false);
23139:             saveState(); updateUI(); showToast('Operational Window setting saved');
23140:         } catch (error) {
23141:             showToast('Operational setting contains invalid JSON');
23142:         }
23143:         return true;
23144:     }
23145: 
23146:     // Issue #391: legacy Mission Requirements Matrix retired; operationalWindow is authoritative.
23147: 
23148:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
23149:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
23150:     }
23151: 
23152:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
23153:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
23154:     }
23155: 
23156:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
23157:         let total = 0;
23158:         let known = 0;
23159:         let unknown = 0;
23160:         let eligible = 0;
23161:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
23162:         const sources = new Map();
23163:         for (const entry of entries) {
23164:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
23165:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
23166:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
23167:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
23168:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
23169:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
23170:             const value = details.value;
23171:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
23172:                 unknown += 1;
23173:                 continue;
23174:             }
23175:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
23176:             known += 1;
23177:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
23178:         }
23179:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
23180:     }
23181: 
23182:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
23183:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
23184:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
23185:     }
23186: 
23187:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
23188:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
23189:     }
23190: 
23191:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
23192:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
23193:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
23194:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
23195:     }
23196: 
23197:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
23198:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
23199:         const noScene = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => Boolean(entry?.units?.known) && Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onScene) || 0) === 0);
23200:         const assistance = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === 'assistance');
23201:         const visible = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries);
23202:         const mode = selectedCriticalValueMode();
23203:         const showingText = `${mode === 'eligible' ? 'Eligible' : 'Total'} MissionChief average credits for ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} currently visible mission${visibleEntries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
23204:         const valueCard = (className, label, group) => `<div class="mcms-critical-value-card ${className}" title="${escapeHtml(criticalValueTitle(label, group))}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(criticalValueDisplay(group))}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(criticalValueCoverage(group))}</small></div>`;
23205:         return `
23206:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-label" title="${escapeHtml(showingText)}"><strong>MISSION</strong><span>VALUE</span></div>
23207:             <div class="mcms-critical-value-mode" role="group" aria-label="Mission value mode">
23208:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="total" class="${mode === 'total' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'total'}">TOTAL</button>
23209:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="eligible" class="${mode === 'eligible' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'eligible'}">ELIGIBLE</button>
23210:             </div>
23211:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-grid">
23212:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-no-scene', 'No Scene', noScene)}
23213:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-assistance', 'Assistance', assistance)}
23214:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-all', 'Visible Value', visible)}
23215:             </div>
23216:             <span class="mcms-critical-showing">SHOWING ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} OF ${allEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} MISSIONS</span>`;
23217:     }

23219:     function criticalSummaryHtml(allEntries) {
23220:         const baseForStatus = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['status']);
23221:         const baseForOnWay = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['onway']);
23222:         const baseForMyUnits = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['myunits']);
23223:         const statusCounts = { all: baseForStatus.length, attention: 0, 'no-scene': 0, assistance: 0, clearing: 0, 'on-scene': 0, syncing: 0 };
23224:         for (const entry of baseForStatus) {
23225:             const key = criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry);
23226:             if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(statusCounts, key)) statusCounts[key] += 1;
23227:             if (key === 'no-scene' || key === 'assistance') statusCounts.attention += 1;
23228:         }
23229:         let onWayMissions = 0;
23230:         let onWayVehicles = 0;
23231:         for (const entry of baseForOnWay) {
23232:             const count = Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onWay ?? entry?.units?.travelling) || 0);
23233:             if (count > 0) onWayMissions += 1;
23234:             onWayVehicles += count;
23235:         }
23236:         const selectedStatus = selectedCriticalPrimaryStatus();
23237:         const statusCard = (key, className, label, value, title = '') => {
23238:             const active = selectedStatus === key;
23239:             return `<button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter ${className}${active ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-primary-status="${escapeHtml(key)}" aria-pressed="${active ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="${escapeHtml(title || `Show ${label} missions`)}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${Number(value).toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${active ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>`;
23240:         };
23241:         const onWayActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.hasVehiclesOnWay);
23242:         const myUnitsActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.onlyMyUnits);
23243:         return `
23244:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
23245:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>MISSION CONDITION</strong><small>Select one condition</small></div>
23246:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-status-grid">
23247:                     ${statusCard('all', 'mcms-summary-aged', 'Any Status', statusCounts.all)}
23248:                     ${statusCard('attention', 'mcms-summary-attention', 'Attention', statusCounts.attention, 'Show missions with no units on scene or detected assistance requirements')}
23249:                     ${statusCard('no-scene', 'mcms-summary-no-scene', 'No Units', statusCounts['no-scene'])}
23250:                     ${statusCard('assistance', 'mcms-summary-assistance', 'Assistance', statusCounts.assistance)}
23251:                     ${statusCard('clearing', 'mcms-summary-clearing', 'Clearing', statusCounts.clearing)}
23252:                     ${statusCard('on-scene', 'mcms-summary-on-scene', 'Stable', statusCounts['on-scene'])}
23253:                 </div>
23254:             </section>
23255:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
23256:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>UNIT SCOPE</strong><small>Optional additional requirements</small></div>
23257:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-condition-grid">
23258:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-enroute${onWayActive ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-condition="onway" aria-pressed="${onWayActive ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="Require at least one Code 3 vehicle responding"><span>Vehicles On Way</span><strong>${onWayMissions.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><small>${onWayVehicles.toLocaleString('en-GB')} vehicles</small><i aria-hidden="true">${onWayActive ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>
23259:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-my-units${myUnitsActive ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-condition="my-units" aria-pressed="${myUnitsActive ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="Show only missions with one of your units committed"><span>Only My Units</span><strong>${baseForMyUnits.filter(criticalEntryHasMyUnits).length.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${myUnitsActive ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>
23260:                 </div>
23261:             </section>
23262:             ${statusCounts.syncing ? `<div class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-summary-syncing" title="Vehicle data is still loading for these missions"><span>Syncing Data</span><strong>${statusCounts.syncing.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong></div>` : ''}`;
23263:     }
23264: 
23265:     function nativeMissionCountdownText(missionId) {
23266:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
23267:         if (id === null) return '';
23268:         const node = document.getElementById(`mission_overview_countdown_${id}`)
23269:             || document.querySelector(`#mission_${id} [id^="mission_overview_countdown_"], #mission_${id} .mission_overview_countdown, #mission_${id} .mission-countdown`);
23270:         const text = String(node?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
23271:         return text && !/^[-—]+$/u.test(text) ? text : '';
23272:     }
23273: 
23274:     function formatMissionCountdown(ms) {
23275:         const seconds = Math.max(0, Math.ceil(Number(ms) / 1000));
23276:         const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
23277:         const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
23278:         const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60;
23279:         if (hours > 0) return `${hours}:${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
23280:         return `${minutes}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
23281:     }
23282: 
23283:     function normaliseMissionTimestampMs(value) {
23284:         const number = Number(value);
23285:         if (!Number.isFinite(number) || number <= 0) return null;

31456:     function boot() {
31457:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
31458:         bootStarted = true;
31459:         bootStartedAt = Date.now();
31460:         const bootPerformanceStartedAt = startupClock();
31461:         const allianceBuildingsOnly = isAllianceBuildingsPath() && state.allianceBuildingsMap === false;
31462:         if (!allianceBuildingsOnly) startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt);
31463:         runBootIntegration('root attributes', applyRootAttributes);
31464:         runBootIntegration('Alliance Buildings optimisation', installAllianceBuildingsPageOptimisation);
31465:         if (allianceBuildingsOnly) return;
31466:         runBootIntegration('clean-mode exit', createCleanExit);
31467:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) runBootIntegration('auto-load all vehicles', installAutoLoadAllVehicles);
31468:         runBootIntegration('mission marker hook', installMissionMarkerAddHook);
31469:         runBootIntegration('radio message hook', installRadioMessageHook);
31470:         lastObservedCredits = runBootIntegration('initial credit total', readCurrentCreditTotal);
31471:         runBootIntegration('credits update hook', installCreditsUpdateHook);
31472:         runBootIntegration('credits observer', observeCreditValue);
31473:         runBootIntegration('operational suite shell', installOperationalSuiteShell);
31474:         runBootIntegration('custom vehicle badges', installCustomVehicleBadges);
31475:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
31476:             if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) {
31477:                 economyDeferredDomMutation = true;
31478:                 return;
31479:             }
31480:             let externalMutationFound = false;
31481:             let addedLeafletMarker = false;
31482:             let missionChanged = false;
31483:             let layoutChanged = false;
31484:             let toolkitUiRemoved = false;
31485:             for (const mutation of mutations) {
31486:                 if (mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation)) continue;
31487:                 externalMutationFound = true;
31488:                 if (!addedLeafletMarker && mutationAddsLeafletMarkerIcon(mutation)) {
31489:                     addedLeafletMarker = true;
31490:                     missionChanged = true;
31491:                 }
31492:                 if (!missionChanged && mutationAffectsMissionData(mutation)) missionChanged = true;
31493:                 if (!layoutChanged && mutationAffectsMapLayout(mutation)) layoutChanged = true;
31494:                 if (!toolkitUiRemoved && mutationRemovesToolkitUi(mutation)) toolkitUiRemoved = true;
31495:                 if (addedLeafletMarker && missionChanged && layoutChanged && toolkitUiRemoved) break;
31496:             }
31497:             if (!externalMutationFound) return;
31498:             missionChanged ||= addedLeafletMarker;
31499:             if (!missionChanged && !layoutChanged && !toolkitUiRemoved) return;
31500:             if (addedLeafletMarker) {
31501:                 invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('all');
31502:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
31503:                 if (!state.visibility.buildings) scheduleMarkerStateSync(180, true);
31504:             }
31505:             if (layoutChanged) invalidateMapElementCache();
31506:             if (document.hidden || dragState || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
31507:             runtimeClearTimeout(mutationTimer);
31508:             const startupSettling = bootStartedAt > 0 && Date.now() - bootStartedAt < STARTUP_SETTLE_WINDOW_MS;
31509:             const mutationDelay = startupSettling
31510:                 ? STARTUP_MUTATION_DEBOUNCE_MS
31511:                 : (state.economyMode ? Math.max(320, DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS) : DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS);
31512:             mutationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
31513:                 if (dragState || document.hidden || runtime.destroyed || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
31514:                 const panelMissing = settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
31515:                 const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
31516:                 const controlMissing = Boolean(mapElement && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
31517:                 if (toolkitUiRemoved || panelMissing || controlMissing) ensureUi();
31518:                 if (mainMutationObserverFallbackActive && (mapElement || document.querySelector('#missions, #mission_list, .missions-panel, .mission-list'))) {
31519:                     connectMainMutationObserver();
31520:                 }
31521:                 if (layoutChanged) {
31522:                     refreshSuppression();
31523:                     fitControlToMap();
31524:                     schedulePanelPosition(true, 50);
31525:                     scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(60);
31526:                 }
31527:                 if (missionChanged) {
31528:                     scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
31529:                     scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(35);
31530:                     if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(35);
31531:                 }
31532:             }, mutationDelay);
31533:         }));
31534:         mainMutationObserver = observer;
31535:         runtimeListen(document, 'keydown', handleKeyboard);
31536:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerover', handleMissionInspectorPointerOver, true);
31537:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointermove', handleMissionInspectorPointerMove, true);
31538:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerout', handleMissionInspectorPointerOut, true);
31539:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerdown', () => unlockPayoutAudio(), { once: true, capture: true });
31540:         runtimeListen(document, 'click', event => {
31541:             runtimeSetTimeout(refreshSuppression, 0);
31542:             if (suppressNextOutsideClick) {
31543:                 event.preventDefault();
31544:                 event.stopPropagation();
31545:                 suppressNextOutsideClick = false;
31546:                 return;
31547:             }
31548:             const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
31549:             const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
31550:             if (!panel || !panel.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
31551:             if (control && control.contains(event.target)) return;
31552:             if (panel.contains(event.target)) return;
31553:             closePanel();
31554:         }, true);
31555:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'resize', () => {
31556:             invalidateMapElementCache();
31557:             applyRootAttributes();
31558:             refreshTabletModeUi();
31559:             scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('window-resize');
31560:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
31561:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay);
31562:             if (dragState) return;
31563:             refreshSuppression();
31564:             fitControlToMap();
31565:             schedulePanelPosition(true, 40);
31566:             scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(30);
31567:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
31568:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedLayout();
31569:         });
31570:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'scroll', scheduleMajorIncidentFeedLayout, { passive: true });
31571:         runtimeListen(pageWindow,'orientationchange',()=>scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('orientationchange'));
31572:         if(pageWindow.visualViewport){

31575:         }

31581:         } catch (err) {}
31582:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'focus', () => {
31583:             scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('window-focus'); if (dragState) return;
31584:             refreshSuppression();
31585:             fitControlToMap();

31593:         });

31597:                 invalidateMapElementCache();

31605:             }, 650);
31606:         };

31608:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'popstate', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
31609:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'hashchange', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
31610:         registerBootMaintenanceTasks();
