===== BLOCK // Issue #378 enhanced requirements pure engine. =====
00001:     // Issue #378 enhanced requirements pure engine.
00002:     // This block is intentionally DOM-free. Phase 3 validates the data model before any
00003:     // renderer or observer can replace the stable Matrix runtime.
00004:     const OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS = Object.freeze(['vehicles', 'staff', 'other']);
00005: 
00006:     function operationalRequirementEscapeRegex(value) {
00007:         return String(value ?? '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/gu, '\\$&');
00008:     }
00009: 
00010:     function operationalRequirementNormaliseText(value) {
00011:         return String(value ?? '')
00012:             .replace(/[\u00a0\s]+/gu, ' ')
00013:             .replace(/\s+([,.:])/gu, '$1')
00014:             .trim();
00015:     }
00016: 
00017:     function operationalRequirementNumber(value, fallback = 0) {
00018:         const normalised = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/gu, '');
00019:         const parsed = Number.parseInt(normalised, 10);
00020:         return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : fallback;
00021:     }
00022: 
00023:     function operationalRequirementCloneRange(value) {
00024:         return {
00025:             min: Math.max(0, Number(value?.min) || 0),
00026:             max: Math.max(0, Number(value?.max) || 0)
00027:         };
00028:     }
00029: 
00030:     function operationalRequirementDefinitionList(value) {
00031:         return Array.isArray(value) ? value.filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object') : [];
00032:     }
00033: 
00034:     function operationalRequirementMatcher(texts) {
00035:         const labels = (Array.isArray(texts) ? texts : [texts])
00036:             .map(operationalRequirementNormaliseText)
00037:             .filter(Boolean)
00038:             .sort((left, right) => right.length - left.length)
00039:             .map(operationalRequirementEscapeRegex);
00040:         if (!labels.length) return null;
00041:         const number = '\\d{1,3}(?:[,.\\s]?\\d{3})*x?';
00042:         return new RegExp(`((?:${number}\\s+(?:${labels.join('|')}))|(?:(?:${labels.join('|')}):\\s*${number}))(?=[,.]|$)`, 'iu');
00043:     }
00044: 
00045:     function operationalRequirementSplitMatch(value) {
00046:         const match = operationalRequirementNormaliseText(value);
00047:         const colon = /:\s*[0-9][0-9,.\s]*x?$/u.test(match);
00048:         const amountText = match.match(colon ? /[0-9][0-9,.\s]*x?$/u : /^[0-9][0-9,.\s]*x?/u)?.[0] ?? '0';
00049:         return {
00050:             requirement: match
00051:                 .replace(colon ? /:\s*[0-9][0-9,.\s]*x?$/u : /^[0-9][0-9,.\s]*x?/u, '')
00052:                 .trim(),
00053:             missing: Math.max(0, operationalRequirementNumber(amountText, 0))
00054:         };
00055:     }
00056: 
00057:     function operationalRequirementCleanRemaining(value) {
00058:         return operationalRequirementNormaliseText(value)
00059:             .replace(/,\s*(?=,|$)/gmu, '')
00060:             .replace(/^,\s*/gmu, '')
00061:             .replace(/\s+,/gmu, ',')
00062:             .trim();
00063:     }
00064: 
00065:     function operationalRequirementIndexAdd(index, type, group, requirementIndex) {
00066:         const key = String(type);
00067:         index[key] ??= {};
00068:         index[key][group] ??= [];
00069:         if (!index[key][group].includes(requirementIndex)) index[key][group].push(requirementIndex);
00070:     }
00071: 
00072:     function operationalRequirementFactor(requirement, type, fallback = 1) {
00073:         const factor = requirement?.additional?.factors?.[String(type)];
00074:         return Number.isFinite(Number(factor)) ? Number(factor) : fallback;
00075:     }
00076: 
00077:     function operationalRequirementCreateModel(input = {}) {
00078:         const catalog = input.catalog && typeof input.catalog === 'object' ? input.catalog : {};
00079:         const missionAdditional = input.missionAdditional && typeof input.missionAdditional === 'object'
00080:             ? input.missionAdditional
00081:             : {};
00082:         const requirements = { vehicles: [], staff: [], other: [] };
00083:         const requirementTexts = { vehicles: null, staff: null, other: null };
00084:         const requirementsForVehicle = {};
00085:         const requirementsForEquipment = {};
00086: 
00087:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
00088:             const supplied = input.texts?.[group];
00089:             if (supplied === undefined || supplied === null) continue;
00090:             const raw = operationalRequirementNormaliseText(
00091:                 typeof supplied === 'object' && !Array.isArray(supplied) ? supplied.raw : supplied
00092:             );
00093:             const infoText = operationalRequirementNormaliseText(
00094:                 typeof supplied === 'object' && !Array.isArray(supplied) ? supplied.infoText : ''
00095:             );
00096:             requirementTexts[group] = { infoText, raw, remaining: raw };
00097:         }
00098: 
00099:         for (const bar of ['water', 'foam', 'pump']) {
00100:             const progress = input.progress?.[bar];
00101:             const textGroup = requirementTexts.other;
00102:             if (!progress || !textGroup) continue;
00103:             const matcher = operationalRequirementMatcher(progress.texts ?? progress.requirement ?? bar);
00104:             const match = matcher?.exec(textGroup.remaining)?.[0];
00105:             if (!match) continue;
00106:             textGroup.remaining = textGroup.remaining.replace(match, '');
00107:             const driving = Math.max(0, Number(progress.driving) || 0);
00108:             requirements.other.push({
00109:                 key: `progress:${bar}`,
00110:                 requirement: operationalRequirementSplitMatch(match).requirement,
00111:                 missing: Math.max(0, Number(progress.missing) || 0) + driving,
00112:                 driving,
00113:                 selected: Math.max(0, Number(progress.selected) || 0),
00114:                 bar
00115:             });
00116:         }
00117: 
00118:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
00119:             const textGroup = requirementTexts[group];
00120:             if (!textGroup) continue;
00121:             const preprocessors = Array.isArray(input.preprocessors?.[group]) ? input.preprocessors[group] : [];
00122:             for (const processor of preprocessors) {
00123:                 if (!processor || typeof processor.pattern !== 'string') continue;
00124:                 try {
00125:                     textGroup.remaining = textGroup.remaining.replace(
00126:                         new RegExp(processor.pattern, processor.flags || 'gu'),
00127:                         String(processor.replace ?? '')
00128:                     );
00129:                 } catch (error) {
00130:                     // Invalid optional locale preprocessors are ignored without corrupting raw text.
00131:                 }
00132:             }
00133: 
00134:             for (const [definitionIndex, definition] of operationalRequirementDefinitionList(catalog[group]).entries()) {
00135:                 const matcher = operationalRequirementMatcher(definition.texts);
00136:                 const match = matcher?.exec(textGroup.remaining)?.[0];
00137:                 if (!match) continue;
00138:                 textGroup.remaining = textGroup.remaining.replace(match, '');
00139:                 const parsed = operationalRequirementSplitMatch(match);
00140:                 const requirementIndex = requirements[group].length;
00141:                 const vehicles = new Set(
00142:                     operationalRequirementDefinitionList([])
00143:                 );
00144:                 for (const vehicle of Array.isArray(definition.vehicles) ? definition.vehicles : []) {
00145:                     if (Number.isFinite(Number(vehicle))) vehicles.add(Number(vehicle));
00146:                 }
00147:                 for (const [condition, conditional] of Object.entries(definition.conditionalVehicles ?? {})) {
00148:                     if (!missionAdditional[condition]) continue;
00149:                     for (const vehicle of Array.isArray(conditional) ? conditional : []) {
00150:                         if (Number.isFinite(Number(vehicle))) vehicles.add(Number(vehicle));
00151:                     }
00152:                 }
00153:                 for (const vehicle of vehicles) {
00154:                     operationalRequirementIndexAdd(requirementsForVehicle, vehicle, group, requirementIndex);
00155:                 }
00156:                 for (const equipment of Array.isArray(definition.equipment) ? definition.equipment : []) {
00157:                     if (String(equipment).trim()) {
00158:                         operationalRequirementIndexAdd(requirementsForEquipment, String(equipment), group, requirementIndex);
00159:                     }
00160:                 }
00161:                 requirements[group].push({
00162:                     key: String(definition.key ?? `${group}:${definitionIndex}`),
00163:                     requirement: parsed.requirement,
00164:                     missing: parsed.missing,
00165:                     driving: 0,
00166:                     selected: group === 'staff' ? { min: 0, max: 0 } : 0,
00167:                     additional: {
00168:                         texts: Array.isArray(definition.texts) ? definition.texts.slice() : [String(definition.texts ?? '')],
00169:                         vehicles: Array.from(vehicles),
00170:                         equipment: Array.isArray(definition.equipment) ? definition.equipment.slice() : [],
00171:                         conditionalVehicles: { ...(definition.conditionalVehicles ?? {}) },
00172:                         factors: { ...(definition.factors ?? {}) }
00173:                     }
00174:                 });
00175:             }
00176:             textGroup.remaining = operationalRequirementCleanRemaining(textGroup.remaining);
00177:         }
00178: 
00179:         const addDriving = (type, group, amount, isEquipment = false) => {
00180:             const index = isEquipment ? requirementsForEquipment : requirementsForVehicle;
00181:             for (const requirementIndex of index[String(type)]?.[group] ?? []) {
00182:                 const requirement = requirements[group][requirementIndex];
00183:                 requirement.driving += operationalRequirementFactor(requirement, type, amount);
00184:             }
00185:         };
00186: 
00187:         for (const vehicle of Array.isArray(input.driving) ? input.driving : []) {
00188:             const vehicleType = Number(vehicle?.vehicleType);
00189:             if (Number.isFinite(vehicleType) && vehicleType >= 0) {
00190:                 addDriving(vehicleType, 'vehicles', 1);
00191:                 addDriving(vehicleType, 'other', 1);
00192:                 const staff = Math.max(0, Number(vehicle?.staff) || 0);
00193:                 if (staff > 0) addDriving(vehicleType, 'staff', staff);
00194:             }
00195:             for (const equipment of Array.isArray(vehicle?.equipment) ? vehicle.equipment : []) {
00196:                 for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) addDriving(String(equipment), group, 1, true);
00197:             }
00198:         }
00199: 
00200:         const selected = {
00201:             vehicles: new Array(requirements.vehicles.length).fill(0),
00202:             staff: new Array(requirements.staff.length).fill(0).map(() => ({ min: 0, max: 0 })),
00203:             other: new Array(requirements.other.length).fill(0)
00204:         };
00205:         const selectedVehicles = Array.isArray(input.selected) ? input.selected : [];
00206:         const selectedIds = new Set(selectedVehicles.map(vehicle => Number(vehicle?.id)).filter(Number.isFinite));
00207: 
00208:         const increaseSelected = (type, group, amount = 1, range = null, isEquipment = false) => {
00209:             const index = isEquipment ? requirementsForEquipment : requirementsForVehicle;
00210:             for (const requirementIndex of index[String(type)]?.[group] ?? []) {
00211:                 if (group === 'staff') {
00212:                     const staff = operationalRequirementCloneRange(range);
00213:                     selected.staff[requirementIndex].min += staff.min;
00214:                     selected.staff[requirementIndex].max += staff.max;
00215:                 } else {
00216:                     selected[group][requirementIndex] += operationalRequirementFactor(
00217:                         requirements[group][requirementIndex],
00218:                         type,
00219:                         amount
00220:                     );
00221:                 }
00222:             }
00223:         };
00224: 
00225:         const vehicleTypes = input.vehicleTypes && typeof input.vehicleTypes === 'object' ? input.vehicleTypes : {};
00226:         const requirementsByRandomTractive = {};
00227:         for (const [trailerType, metadata] of Object.entries(vehicleTypes)) {
00228:             const tractives = Array.isArray(metadata?.tractiveVehicles)
00229:                 ? metadata.tractiveVehicles.map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite)
00230:                 : [];
00231:             if (!tractives.length) continue;
00232:             requirementsByRandomTractive[trailerType] = {};
00233:             for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
00234:                 let intersection = null;
00235:                 for (const tractiveType of tractives) {
00236:                     const values = new Set(requirementsForVehicle[String(tractiveType)]?.[group] ?? []);
00237:                     intersection = intersection === null
00238:                         ? values
00239:                         : new Set(Array.from(intersection).filter(value => values.has(value)));
00240:                 }
00241:                 requirementsByRandomTractive[trailerType][group] = Array.from(intersection ?? []);
00242:             }
00243:         }
00244: 
00245:         const randomTractiveCounts = {};
00246:         for (const vehicle of selectedVehicles) {
00247:             const vehicleType = Number(vehicle?.vehicleType);
00248:             if (!Number.isFinite(vehicleType) || vehicleType < 0) continue;
00249:             const staff = operationalRequirementCloneRange(vehicle?.staff);
00250:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'vehicles', 1);
00251:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'other', 1);
00252:             increaseSelected(vehicleType, 'staff', 1, staff);
00253:             for (const equipment of Array.isArray(vehicle?.equipment) ? vehicle.equipment : []) {
00254:                 for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
00255:                     increaseSelected(String(equipment), group, 1, null, true);
00256:                 }
00257:             }
00258: 
00259:             const tractiveId = Number(vehicle?.tractiveVehicleId);
00260:             const tractiveType = Number(vehicle?.tractiveVehicleType);
00261:             const explicitTractive = vehicle?.tractiveRandom === false || vehicle?.tractiveRandom === 0 || vehicle?.tractiveRandom === '0';
00262:             if (explicitTractive && Number.isFinite(tractiveType) && !selectedIds.has(tractiveId)) {
00263:                 const tractiveStaff = operationalRequirementCloneRange(vehicle?.tractiveStaff);
00264:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'vehicles', 1);
00265:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'other', 1);
00266:                 increaseSelected(tractiveType, 'staff', 1, tractiveStaff);
00267:             } else if (vehicleTypes[String(vehicleType)]?.tractiveVehicles) {
00268:                 randomTractiveCounts[String(vehicleType)] = (randomTractiveCounts[String(vehicleType)] ?? 0) + 1;
00269:             }
00270:         }
00271: 
00272:         for (const [trailerType, amount] of Object.entries(randomTractiveCounts)) {
00273:             for (const group of ['vehicles', 'other']) {
00274:                 for (const requirementIndex of requirementsByRandomTractive[trailerType]?.[group] ?? []) {
00275:                     selected[group][requirementIndex] += Number(amount) || 0;
00276:                 }
00277:             }
00278:         }
00279: 
00280:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
00281:             requirements[group].forEach((requirement, index) => {
00282:                 if (requirement.bar) {
00283:                     const progress = input.progress?.[requirement.bar];
00284:                     requirement.selected = Math.max(0, Number(progress?.selected) || 0);
00285:                 } else {
00286:                     requirement.selected = group === 'staff'
00287:                         ? operationalRequirementCloneRange(selected.staff[index])
00288:                         : Math.max(0, Number(selected[group][index]) || 0);
00289:                 }
00290:             });
00291:         }
00292: 
00293:         return {
00294:             requirements,
00295:             requirementTexts,
00296:             requirementsForVehicle,
00297:             requirementsForEquipment
00298:         };
00299:     }
00300: 
00301:     function operationalRequirementRows(model, options = {}) {
00302:         const calcMaxStaff = options.calcMaxStaff === true;
00303:         const rows = [];
00304:         for (const group of OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS) {
00305:             for (const requirement of model?.requirements?.[group] ?? []) {
00306:                 const selectedValue = typeof requirement.selected === 'number'
00307:                     ? requirement.selected
00308:                     : calcMaxStaff
00309:                       ? requirement.selected.max
00310:                       : requirement.selected.min;
00311:                 const remainingOnMission = requirement.missing - requirement.driving;
00312:                 rows.push({
00313:                     ...requirement,
00314:                     group,
00315:                     remainingOnMission,
00316:                     selectedValue,
00317:                     covered: remainingOnMission <= selectedValue
00318:                 });
00319:             }
00320:         }
00321:         return rows;
00322:     }
00323: 
00324:     function operationalRequirementFingerprint(model, options = {}) {
00325:         return JSON.stringify({
00326:             rows: operationalRequirementRows(model, options),
00327:             remaining: OPERATIONAL_REQUIREMENT_GROUPS.map(group => model?.requirementTexts?.[group]?.remaining ?? null)
00328:         });
00329:     }
00330:     // Issue #378 end enhanced requirements pure engine.
===== BLOCK // Issue #378 complete operational feature suite. =====
00001:     // Issue #378 complete operational feature suite.
00002:     const OP_FEATURE_ATTR = 'data-mcms-operational-feature';
00003:     const OP_BOOL_KEYS = Object.freeze({
00004:         requirements: 'enabled,calcMaxStaff,hoverTip,overlay,minified,pushRight',
00005:         callWindow: 'enabled,generationDate,redBorder,patientSummary,collapsiblePatients,arrCounter,arrCounterAsBadge,arrClickHighlight,arrCounterResetSelection,arrMatchHighlight,arrMatchHighlightAllWords,arrTime,arrSpecs,alarmTime,stickyHeader,loadMoreVehiclesInHeader,hideVehicleList,centerMap,stagingAreaSelectedCounter,vehicleTypeInList,remainingPatientTime,vehicleCounter,vehicleListPermanentSearch,playerCounter,selectedVehicleCounter,arrSearch,arrSearchDissolveCategories,arrSearchCompactResults,arrSearchSelectOnEnter,arrSearchClearOnEnter,arrSearchAutoFocus,arrSearchDropdown,arrSearchCloseDropdownOnSelect,moreReleasePatientButtons',
00006:         missionList: 'enabled,remainingTime,remainingTimeGreenOnly,remainingPatientTime,remainingPumpingTime,starrableMissions,averageCredits,collapsibleMissions,collapsibleMissionsAllButton,shareMissions,sortMissions,sortMissionsInMissionWindow,sortMissionsInMissionWindowChecked,currentPatients,hideZeroCurrentPatients,currentPatientsInTooltips,currentPrisoners,hideZeroCurrentPrisoners,currentPrisonersInTooltips,fixedEventInfo',
00007:         transport: 'enabled,autoClickSuccessButtons,autoOpenTransportRequest'
00008:     });
00009:     const OP_LABELS = Object.freeze({
00010:         requirements: 'Enhanced requirements', callWindow: 'Extended Call Window',
00011:         missionList: 'Extended Call List', transport: 'Enhanced Transport Requests'
00012:     });
00013:     const operationalFeatureContexts = new WeakMap();
00014: 
00015:     function operationalQuery(root, selector) {
00016:         try { return root?.querySelector?.(selector) || null; } catch (error) { return null; }
00017:     }
00018:     function operationalQueryAll(root, selector) {
00019:         try { return Array.from(root?.querySelectorAll?.(selector) || []); } catch (error) { return []; }
00020:     }
00021:     function operationalEscape(value) {
00022:         return String(value ?? '').replace(/[&<>"']/gu, character => ({
00023:             '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;'
00024:         })[character]);
00025:     }
00026:     function operationalVisible(node) {
00027:         if (!node?.isConnected || node.hidden || node.disabled || node.getAttribute?.('aria-hidden') === 'true') return false;
00028:         try {
00029:             const style = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.getComputedStyle?.(node);
00030:             const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect?.();
00031:             return style?.display !== 'none' && style?.visibility !== 'hidden' && (!rect || rect.width > 0 || rect.height > 0);
00032:         } catch (error) { return true; }
00033:     }
00034:     function operationalFeatureState(context) {
00035:         let value = operationalFeatureContexts.get(context);
00036:         if (!value) {
00037:             value = { transportTokens: new Set(), route: '', arrHandlers: new Map() };
00038:             operationalFeatureContexts.set(context, value);
00039:         }
00040:         return value;
00041:     }
00042:     function operationalFeatureValue(path) {
00043:         return String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean).reduce((value, part) => value?.[part], state.operationalWindow);
00044:     }
00045:     function operationalFeatureSet(path, value) {
00046:         const parts = String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean);
00047:         let target = state.operationalWindow;
00048:         for (const part of parts.slice(0, -1)) target = target[part] ??= {};
00049:         target[parts.at(-1)] = value;
00050:     }
00051:     function operationalFeatureMissionId(row) {
00052:         return String(row?.dataset?.missionId || row?.id?.match(/mission[_-](\d+)/u)?.[1]
00053:             || operationalQuery(row, 'a[href*="/missions/"]')?.href?.match(/\/missions\/(\d+)/u)?.[1] || '');
00054:     }
00055:     function operationalFeatureNumber(node, names) {
00056:         for (const name of names) {
00057:             const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(node?.getAttribute?.(name) ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/gu, ''), 10);
00058:             if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
00059:         }
00060:         return 0;
00061:     }
00062:     function operationalFeatureOwn(node, kind) {
00063:         node?.setAttribute?.(OP_FEATURE_ATTR, kind);
00064:         return node;
00065:     }
00066:     function operationalFeatureRemove(context, prefix = '') {
00067:         const safe = String(prefix).replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/giu, '');
00068:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, safe ? `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}^="${safe}"]` : `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]`).forEach(node => node.remove());
00069:     }
00070: 
00071:     function operationalWindowSettingsMarkup() {
00072:         const groups = Object.entries(OP_BOOL_KEYS).map(([group, csv]) => `
00073:             <details class="mcms-operational-settings-group" open>
00074:                 <summary>${OP_LABELS[group]}</summary>
00075:                 ${csv.split(',').map(key => `<label class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">${operationalEscape(key.replace(/([A-Z])/gu, ' $1').replace(/^./u, value => value.toUpperCase()))}</span><input type="checkbox" data-operational-setting="${group}.${key}" data-operational-type="boolean"></label>`).join('')}
00076:             </details>`).join('');
00077:         const advanced = [
00078:             ['requirements.viewMode', 'Requirements view', 'table,text'],
00079:             ['requirements.sort', 'Requirement sorting', 'requirement,missing,driving,selected,total'],
00080:             ['requirements.sortDir', 'Requirement direction', 'asc,desc'],
00081:             ['missionList.sortMissionsType', 'Mission sorting', ',name,credits,patients,prisoners,time'],
00082:             ['missionList.sortMissionsDirection', 'Mission direction', ',asc,desc']
00083:         ].map(([path, label, values]) => `<label class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">${label}</span><select class="mcms-select" data-operational-setting="${path}" data-operational-type="string">${values.split(',').map(value => `<option value="${value}">${value || 'Default'}</option>`).join('')}</select></label>`).join('');
00084:         const json = [
00085:             'callWindow.tailoredTabs','callWindow.missionKeywords','callWindow.alarmIcons',
00086:             'callWindow.arrCategoryColors','callWindow.selectedVehicleCounterVehicleTypes',
00087:             'missionList.shareMissionTypes','missionList.eventMissions'
00088:         ].map(path => `<label class="mcms-operational-json-row"><span>${path}</span><textarea rows="2" class="mcms-input" data-operational-setting="${path}" data-operational-type="json"></textarea></label>`).join('');
00089:         return `<div class="mcms-section-label">Operational Window Suite</div><div class="mcms-status">Toolkit-native operational controls. Transport automation remains opt-in.</div><label class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Suite enabled</span><input type="checkbox" data-operational-setting="enabled" data-operational-type="boolean"></label>${groups}<details class="mcms-operational-settings-group"><summary>Sorting and advanced data</summary>${advanced}${json}</details>`;
00090:     }
00091:     function operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi(panel = operationalQuery(document, `#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) {
00092:         operationalQueryAll(panel, '[data-operational-setting]').forEach(control => {
00093:             const value = operationalFeatureValue(control.dataset.operationalSetting);
00094:             if (control.dataset.operationalType === 'boolean') control.checked = value === true;
00095:             else if (document.activeElement !== control) control.value = control.dataset.operationalType === 'json' ? JSON.stringify(value ?? []) : value ?? '';
00096:         });
00097:     }
00098:     const OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID = 'mcms-operational-feature-style';
00099:     function operationalReplaceContent(node, html) {
00100:         if (!node) return;
00101:         node.replaceChildren();
00102:         const content = String(html ?? '');
00103:         if (content) node.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', content);
00104:     }
00105:     function operationalFeatureStyle(doc) {
00106:         if (operationalQuery(doc, `#${OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID}`)) return;
00107:         const style = doc.createElement('style');
00108:         style.id = OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID;
00109:         style.textContent = `
00110:             [${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]{box-sizing:border-box}.mcms-operational-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:7px 0;padding:7px;border:1px solid rgba(13,110,253,.35);border-radius:9px;background:rgba(13,110,253,.08)}
00111:             .mcms-operational-pill{padding:3px 7px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(13,110,253,.16);font-weight:700;font-size:12px}.mcms-operational-controls{display:inline-flex;gap:3px;margin-left:auto}
00112:             .mcms-operational-starred{outline:2px solid #ffc107;outline-offset:-2px}.mcms-operational-collapsed>*:not(a[href*="/missions/"]):not(.mcms-operational-controls){display:none!important}.mcms-operational-patient-hidden,.mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden{display:none!important}
00113:             .mcms-operational-arr-match{outline:2px solid var(--mcms-arr-colour,#008000);outline-offset:1px}.mcms-operational-settings-group{margin:8px 0;padding:7px;border:1px solid rgba(127,127,127,.25);border-radius:8px}.mcms-operational-json-row{display:grid;gap:4px;margin:8px 0}
00114:             @media(max-width:760px){.mcms-operational-bar{padding-left:max(8px,env(safe-area-inset-left));padding-right:max(8px,env(safe-area-inset-right))}.mcms-operational-bar>*{flex:1 1 120px}.mcms-operational-controls{margin-left:0}}
00115:         `;
00116:         (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
00117:     }
00118:     function operationalFeatureBar(doc, anchor, kind) {
00119:         let bar = operationalQuery(doc, `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}="${kind}"]`);
00120:         if (!bar) {
00121:             bar = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('div'), kind);
00122:             bar.className = 'mcms-operational-bar';
00123:             anchor?.parentNode?.insertBefore(bar, anchor);
00124:         }
00125:         operationalReplaceContent(bar, '');
00126:         return bar;
00127:     }
00128:     function operationalPill(doc, text, kind) {
00129:         const node = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('span'), kind);
00130:         node.className = 'mcms-operational-pill'; node.textContent = text; return node;
00131:     }
00132: 
00133:     function operationalCallWindowApply(context) {
00134:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.callWindow || {};
00135:         const doc = context.doc;
00136:         const path = String(doc.defaultView?.location?.pathname || '');
00137:         if (!settings.enabled || !/^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(path) || operationalQuery(doc, '[data-module="extendedCallWindow"]')) {
00138:             operationalFeatureRemove(context, 'call-'); return;
00139:         }
00140:         operationalFeatureStyle(doc);
00141:         operationalFeatureRemove(context, 'call-');
00142:         const anchor = operationalQuery(doc, '#missing_text, #mission_general_info, .mission_general_info, h1');
00143:         if (!anchor) return;
00144:         const bar = operationalFeatureBar(doc, anchor, 'call-toolbar');
00145:         const patients = operationalQueryAll(doc, '#mission_patients .patient,#mission_patients [id^="patient_"],[data-patient-id],.mission_patient');
00146:         const vehicles = operationalQueryAll(doc, '#vehicle_show_table_body_all tr,#occupied tr,#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr');
00147:         const selected = operationalRequirementsSelectedSnapshot(doc);
00148:         const arr = operationalQueryAll(doc, '[data-aao-id],[data-arr-id],.aao,.alarm-and-response-regulation,.alert-response-regulation,[id^="aao_"]').filter(operationalVisible);
00149:         if (settings.patientSummary) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Patients ${patients.length}`, 'call-patients'));
00150:         if (settings.vehicleCounter) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Vehicles ${vehicles.length}`, 'call-vehicles'));
00151:         if (settings.selectedVehicleCounter || settings.stagingAreaSelectedCounter) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Selected ${selected.length}`, 'call-selected'));
00152:         if (settings.playerCounter) {
00153:             const players = new Set(vehicles.map(row => row.dataset?.userId || row.getAttribute?.('data-user-id')).filter(Boolean));
00154:             bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Players ${players.size}`, 'call-players'));
00155:         }
00156:         if (settings.arrCounter) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `ARR ${arr.length}`, 'call-arr-count'));
00157:         if (settings.generationDate || settings.alarmTime) {
00158:             const time = operationalQuery(doc, 'time[datetime],[data-generation-date],[data-alarm-time]');
00159:             const raw = time?.getAttribute?.('datetime') || time?.getAttribute?.('data-generation-date') || time?.getAttribute?.('data-alarm-time');
00160:             if (raw) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `${settings.alarmTime ? 'Alarm' : 'Generated'} ${raw}`, 'call-time'));
00161:         }
00162:         if (settings.collapsiblePatients && patients.length >= Number(settings.collapsiblePatientsMinPatients || 0)) {
00163:             const button = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('button'), 'call-patient-toggle');
00164:             button.type = 'button'; button.className = 'btn btn-default btn-sm'; button.textContent = 'Toggle patients';
00165:             button.onclick = () => patients.forEach(node => node.classList.toggle('mcms-operational-patient-hidden'));
00166:             bar.appendChild(button);
00167:         }
00168:         const search = (label, rows, kind) => {
00169:             const input = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('input'), kind);
00170:             input.type = 'search'; input.className = 'form-control input-sm'; input.placeholder = label;
00171:             input.oninput = () => {
00172:                 const query = input.value.trim().toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB');
00173:                 rows.forEach(row => { row.hidden = Boolean(query) && !String(row.textContent || '').toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB').includes(query); });
00174:             };
00175:             bar.appendChild(input); return input;
00176:         };
00177:         if (settings.vehicleListPermanentSearch && vehicles.length) search('Search vehicles', vehicles, 'call-vehicle-search');
00178:         if (settings.arrSearch && arr.length) {
00179:             const input = search('Search ARR', arr, 'call-arr-search');
00180:             input.onkeydown = event => {
00181:                 if (event.key !== 'Enter') return;
00182:                 const visible = arr.filter(row => !row.hidden);
00183:                 if (settings.arrSearchSelectOnEnter && visible.length === 1) operationalQuery(visible[0], 'a,button,input')?.click?.();
00184:                 if (settings.arrSearchClearOnEnter) { input.value = ''; input.oninput(); }
00185:             };
00186:             if (settings.arrSearchAutoFocus) runtimeSetTimeout(() => input.focus(), 0);
00187:         }
00188:         if (settings.hideVehicleList) {
00189:             const list = operationalQuery(doc, '#vehicle_show_table_body_all');
00190:             const button = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('button'), 'call-vehicle-toggle');
00191:             button.type = 'button'; button.className = 'btn btn-default btn-sm'; button.textContent = 'Toggle vehicles';
00192:             button.onclick = () => list?.classList.toggle('mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden'); bar.appendChild(button);
00193:         }
00194:         if (settings.centerMap) {
00195:             const native = operationalQuery(doc, '.map_position_mover,[data-action="center-map"],#map_position');
00196:             if (native) {
00197:                 const button = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('button'), 'call-center-map');
00198:                 button.type = 'button'; button.className = 'btn btn-default btn-sm'; button.textContent = 'Centre map'; button.onclick = () => native.click(); bar.appendChild(button);
00199:             }
00200:         }
00201:         if (settings.vehicleTypeInList) vehicles.forEach(row => {
00202:             if (operationalQuery(row, `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}="call-vehicle-type"]`)) return;
00203:             const type = operationalRequirementsVehicleType(row); if (type < 0) return;
00204:             const badge = operationalPill(doc, `Type ${type}`, 'call-vehicle-type'); (operationalQuery(row, 'td') || row).appendChild(badge);
00205:         });
00206:         if (settings.stickyHeader) operationalQueryAll(doc, '#vehicle_show_table thead').forEach(node => {
00207:             node.style.position = 'sticky'; node.style.top = '0'; node.style.zIndex = '4'; node.dataset.mcmsOperationalSticky = 'true';
00208:         });
00209:         for (const keyword of settings.missionKeywords || []) {
00210:             const text = String(keyword?.keyword || keyword?.text || ''); const title = operationalQuery(doc, 'h1,.mission_title')?.textContent || '';
00211:             if (text && title.toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB').includes(text.toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB'))) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, text, 'call-keyword'));
00212:         }
00213:         if (settings.arrClickHighlight || settings.arrMatchHighlight) {
00214:             const feature = operationalFeatureState(context);
00215:             arr.forEach(row => {
00216:                 if (feature.arrHandlers.has(row)) return;
00217:                 const previous = row.onclick; feature.arrHandlers.set(row, previous);
00218:                 row.onclick = function (event) {
00219:                     previous?.call?.(this, event);
00220:                     if (state.operationalWindow?.callWindow?.arrCounterResetSelection) arr.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('mcms-operational-arr-match'));
00221:                     row.style.setProperty('--mcms-arr-colour', state.operationalWindow?.callWindow?.arrClickHighlightColor || '#008000');
00222:                     row.classList.add('mcms-operational-arr-match');
00223:                 };
00224:             });
00225:         }
00226:     }
00227: 
00228:     function operationalMissionListRoot(doc) {
00229:         for (const selector of ['#mission_list','#missions','#mission-list','#missions-panel','#mission_panel','.mission-list','.missionSideBarList','[data-mission-list]']) {
00230:             const root = operationalQuery(doc, selector);
00231:             if (root && operationalQuery(root, 'a[href*="/missions/"]')) return root;
00232:         }
00233:         return null;
00234:     }
00235:     function operationalMissionRows(root) {
00236:         const rows = operationalQueryAll(root, '.missionSideBarEntry,.mission-side-bar-entry,[data-mission-id],[id^="mission_"]').filter(operationalFeatureMissionId);
00237:         return rows.length ? Array.from(new Set(rows)) : Array.from(new Set(operationalQueryAll(root, 'a[href*="/missions/"]').map(link => link.closest?.('li,.panel,[id^="mission_"]')).filter(Boolean)));
00238:     }
00239:     function operationalMissionListComputeOrder(records, type = '', direction = '', starredIds = []) {
00240:         const starred = new Set((starredIds || []).map(String)); const multiplier = direction === 'desc' ? -1 : 1;
00241:         const value = record => type === 'name' ? record.name.toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB') : type ? Number(record[type]) || 0 : record.index;
00242:         return records.slice().sort((left, right) => {
00243:             const stars = Number(starred.has(right.id)) - Number(starred.has(left.id)); if (stars) return stars;
00244:             const a = value(left), b = value(right); return (typeof a === 'string' ? a.localeCompare(String(b), 'en-GB') : a - b) * multiplier;
00245:         });
00246:     }
00247:     function operationalMissionListApply(context) {
00248:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.missionList || {}; const doc = context.doc; const root = operationalMissionListRoot(doc);
00249:         if (!settings.enabled || !root || operationalQuery(doc, '[data-module="extendedCallList"]')) { operationalFeatureRemove(context, 'list-'); return; }
00250:         operationalFeatureStyle(doc); operationalFeatureRemove(context, 'list-');
00251:         const rows = operationalMissionRows(root);
00252:         const records = rows.map((row, index) => {
00253:             const id = operationalFeatureMissionId(row); const name = String(operationalQuery(row, 'a[href*="/missions/"]')?.textContent || row.textContent || '').trim();
00254:             return { id, row, name, credits: operationalFeatureNumber(row, ['data-credits','data-average-credits']), patients: operationalFeatureNumber(row, ['data-patients','data-patient-count']), prisoners: operationalFeatureNumber(row, ['data-prisoners','data-prisoner-count']), time: operationalFeatureNumber(row, ['data-remaining-time','data-time-left']), index };
00255:         });
00256:         const toolbar = operationalFeatureBar(doc, root.firstChild || root, 'list-toolbar'); root.insertBefore(toolbar, root.firstChild);
00257:         if (settings.sortMissions) {
00258:             const select = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('select'), 'list-sort'); select.className = 'form-control input-sm';
00259:             operationalReplaceContent(select, '<option value="">Default</option><option value="name">Name</option><option value="credits">Credits</option><option value="patients">Patients</option><option value="prisoners">Prisoners</option><option value="time">Time</option>'); select.value = settings.sortMissionsType || '';
00260:             select.onchange = () => { settings.sortMissionsType = select.value; saveState(); scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0); }; toolbar.appendChild(select);
00261:         }
00262:         if (settings.collapsibleMissionsAllButton) {
00263:             const all = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('button'), 'list-collapse-all'); all.type = 'button'; all.className = 'btn btn-default btn-sm'; all.textContent = settings.allMissionsCollapsed ? 'Expand all' : 'Collapse all';
00264:             all.onclick = () => { settings.allMissionsCollapsed = !settings.allMissionsCollapsed; settings.collapsedMissions = settings.allMissionsCollapsed ? records.map(record => record.id) : []; saveState(); scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0); }; toolbar.appendChild(all);
00265:         }
00266:         records.forEach(record => {
00267:             const controls = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('span'), `list-controls-${record.id}`); controls.className = 'mcms-operational-controls';
00268:             if (settings.starrableMissions) {
00269:                 const star = doc.createElement('button'); star.type = 'button'; star.className = 'btn btn-default btn-xs'; star.textContent = settings.starredMissions.includes(record.id) ? '★' : '☆';
00270:                 star.onclick = event => { event.preventDefault(); settings.starredMissions = settings.starredMissions.includes(record.id) ? settings.starredMissions.filter(id => id !== record.id) : [...settings.starredMissions, record.id]; saveState(); scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0); }; controls.appendChild(star);
00271:                 record.row.classList.toggle('mcms-operational-starred', settings.starredMissions.includes(record.id));
00272:             }
00273:             if (settings.collapsibleMissions) {
00274:                 const collapse = doc.createElement('button'); collapse.type = 'button'; collapse.className = 'btn btn-default btn-xs'; collapse.textContent = settings.collapsedMissions.includes(record.id) ? '＋' : '−';
00275:                 collapse.onclick = event => { event.preventDefault(); settings.collapsedMissions = settings.collapsedMissions.includes(record.id) ? settings.collapsedMissions.filter(id => id !== record.id) : [...settings.collapsedMissions, record.id]; saveState(); scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0); }; controls.appendChild(collapse);
00276:                 record.row.classList.toggle('mcms-operational-collapsed', settings.collapsedMissions.includes(record.id));
00277:             }
00278:             if (settings.shareMissions) {
00279:                 const native = operationalQuery(record.row, 'a[href*="share"],button[data-action*="share"],.mission-share-button');
00280:                 if (native) { const share = doc.createElement('button'); share.type = 'button'; share.className = 'btn btn-success btn-xs'; share.textContent = 'Share'; share.onclick = event => { event.preventDefault(); native.click(); }; controls.appendChild(share); }
00281:             }
00282:             (operationalQuery(record.row, 'a[href*="/missions/"]') || record.row).appendChild(controls);
00283:             const badges = [];
00284:             if (settings.currentPatients && (!settings.hideZeroCurrentPatients || record.patients)) badges.push(`Patients ${record.patients}`);
00285:             if (settings.currentPrisoners && (!settings.hideZeroCurrentPrisoners || record.prisoners)) badges.push(`Prisoners ${record.prisoners}`);
00286:             if (settings.averageCredits && record.credits) badges.push(`Avg ${record.credits.toLocaleString('en-GB')}`);
00287:             if (settings.remainingTime && record.time) badges.push(`Time ${record.time}s`);
00288:             if (badges.length) { const badge = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('div'), `list-badges-${record.id}`); badge.className = 'mcms-operational-bar'; operationalReplaceContent(badge, badges.map(text => `<span class="mcms-operational-pill">${operationalEscape(text)}</span>`).join('')); record.row.appendChild(badge); }
00289:         });
00290:         if (settings.sortMissions) operationalMissionListComputeOrder(records, settings.sortMissionsType, settings.sortMissionsDirection, settings.starredMissions).forEach(record => record.row.parentNode?.appendChild(record.row));
00291:     }
00292: 
00293:     function operationalTransportChooseAction(route, candidates, settings, usedTokens = []) {
00294:         const mission = /^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(route); const vehicle = /^\/vehicles\/\d+(?:\/(?:patient|gefangener|prisoner)\/\d+)?\/?$/u.test(route);
00295:         const mode = settings?.enabled && mission && settings.autoOpenTransportRequest ? 'open' : settings?.enabled && vehicle && settings.autoClickSuccessButtons ? 'success' : '';
00296:         const used = new Set((usedTokens || []).map(String));
00297:         const eligible = (candidates || []).filter(item => item?.mode === mode && item.visible !== false && item.disabled !== true && !used.has(String(item.token || '')));
00298:         return eligible.length === 1 ? eligible[0] : null;
00299:     }
00300:     function operationalTransportApply(context) {
00301:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.transport || {}; const doc = context.doc;
00302:         if (!settings.enabled || operationalQuery(doc, '[data-module="enhancedTransportRequests"]')) return;
00303:         const feature = operationalFeatureState(context); const route = String(doc.defaultView?.location?.pathname || '');
00304:         if (feature.route !== route) { feature.route = route; feature.transportTokens.clear(); }
00305:         const mission = /^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(route); const vehicle = /^\/vehicles\/\d+(?:\/(?:patient|gefangener|prisoner)\/\d+)?\/?$/u.test(route);
00306:         const selector = mission ? 'a[href*="/patient/"],a[href*="/gefangener/"],a[href*="/prisoner/"],a[href*="transport"],button[data-action*="transport"],.transport_request' : vehicle ? 'a.btn-success,button.btn-success,input.btn-success' : '';
00307:         const mode = mission ? 'open' : 'success';
00308:         const candidates = selector ? operationalQueryAll(doc, selector).filter(node => /transport|hospital|prison|patient|continue|confirm|select/i.test(String(node.textContent || node.value || node.title || node.getAttribute?.('href') || ''))).map(node => ({
00309:             node, mode, visible: operationalVisible(node), disabled: Boolean(node.disabled || node.classList?.contains('disabled') || node.getAttribute?.('aria-disabled') === 'true'),
00310:             token: `${route}|${mode}|${node.id || node.getAttribute?.('href') || node.textContent || node.value}`
00311:         })) : [];
00312:         const action = operationalTransportChooseAction(route, candidates, settings, feature.transportTokens);
00313:         if (!action?.node) return; feature.transportTokens.add(action.token);
00314:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => { if (!runtime.destroyed && operationalVisible(action.node)) action.node.click(); }, 80);
00315:     }
00316: 
00317:     function operationalFeatureObservationRoots(doc) {
00318:         return [operationalMissionListRoot(doc), operationalQuery(doc, '#mission_patients,.mission_patients'), operationalQuery(doc, '#aao,#aao_search_results,.aao-container'), operationalQuery(doc, '#mission_general_info,.mission_general_info'), operationalQuery(doc, '.vehicle_patient_select,.vehicle_prisoner_select')].filter(Boolean);
00319:     }
00320:     function operationalFeatureRenderContext(context) {
00321:         if (!context?.doc || runtime.destroyed || !operationalSuiteEnabled()) return;
00322:         operationalCallWindowApply(context); operationalMissionListApply(context); operationalTransportApply(context);
00323:     }
00324:     function operationalFeatureCleanupContext(context) {
00325:         const feature = operationalFeatureContexts.get(context);
00326:         for (const [row, previous] of feature?.arrHandlers || []) { try { row.onclick = previous || null; } catch (error) {} }
00327:         operationalFeatureRemove(context);
00328:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, '[data-mcms-operational-sticky="true"]').forEach(node => { node.style.removeProperty('position'); node.style.removeProperty('top'); node.style.removeProperty('z-index'); delete node.dataset.mcmsOperationalSticky; });
00329:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, '.mcms-operational-starred,.mcms-operational-collapsed,.mcms-operational-patient-hidden,.mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden,.mcms-operational-arr-match').forEach(node => node.classList.remove('mcms-operational-starred','mcms-operational-collapsed','mcms-operational-patient-hidden','mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden','mcms-operational-arr-match'));
00330:         operationalFeatureContexts.delete(context);
00331:     }
00332:     // Issue #378 end complete operational feature suite.
